    Unreal Engine 5.7 Release Notes

    Source: https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/unreal-engine/unreal-engine-5-7-release-notes

    Application Version: 5.7

    What's New?

    The release of Unreal Engine 5.7 brings further improvements to the UE5 toolset. This release delivers improvements in a wide variety of areas, including Rendering, Character and Animation, Worldbuilding, PCG, and more.

    This release includes improvements submitted by our community of Unreal Engine developers on GitHub. Thank you to each of these contributors to Unreal Engine 5.7:

    AlexanderVeselov-arm, AlexBlackfrost, Almax27, andreibazi, az6667, Bit-Rot, Brian-PD, brpendle-ti, bturner, chrysos8201, ckendal3, ColinGulliver, CookiePLMonster, Darcy3000s, dasherman-ea, davidbaack, dmergele, DoubleDeez, DrewWeth, DTG-Will-Marshall, dyanikoglu, erebel55, Eric2-Praxinos, Erlandys, faisa-believer, foobit, gamethread, geordiemhall, glecko, GreenLightning, guansdu, H3mul, IngSubstance, iniside, jamesfAnet, jamespark-unreal, JasonCoombs, jdamdami, jerobarraco, jeysym, Jiboo, JohnJFarrow, Jordonbc, jorge-axiomvfx, jorgenpt, jpritchard1010, KaosSpectrum, KarimLUCCIN, KeithRare, kimkun07-k, kissSimple, klukule, KXOC, laurencei, lclara-BARB, LHG-JonAnderJimenez, ligazetom, LightKL, lsandersljungberg, LucaFranzo98, Maigo, MarcusSvensson92, Mario-Azcona, MartinWickhamFB, Mattiwatti, melku, michael-buschbeck-ms, Minus4-44, moumee, nickdarnell, phochstrasser, PICO-XR, QRare, r457-Ao2, rdunnington, reduf, redxdev, RiotJDebern, rohyunsang, sareali, serhanio, SilverWinter0511, slonopotamus, SoulSharer, sportbikerr1, ssutherland-riot, SukenderDontNod, Sythenz, teddemunnik, tioez326, tokyocplusplus, Tt-Wes, tustanivsky, Vaei, vladbelousoff, vogoltsov, WangKan, Wizzard033, wmiller, x157, yangskyboxlabs, yoonbigbear, zachlute-arenanet, ZeroEightSix, ZeroErrors, zhou-

    Rendering

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2517,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2047,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MegaLights (Beta)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26122656,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "MegaLights Beta",
      "image": {
        "id": 26122656,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 2420462,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T16:01:56.541+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "058f0ddf-8962-4d66-b974-59696f91cc07",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "058f0ddf-8962-4d66-b974-59696f91cc07",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>MegaLights </b>is now in Beta, with improvements to noise reduction and overall performance. This also brings support for the following features:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Directional Light",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Niagara Particle Lights",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Translucency",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hair Strands",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Niagara Heterogeneous Volumes",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "video_id": "V_9M5ELZ",
      "provider": "kaltura",
      "caption": "",
      "autoplay": false,
      "loop": false,
      "width": null,
      "video": {
        "height": 540,
        "width": 960,
        "identifier": "V_9M5ELZ"
      },
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Heterogeneous Volumes</b> is now in Beta. This update focuses on improvements to shadow-casting with the following new features:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cascade shadows for the directional light.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Beer Shadow Map support for Epic scalability, which provides:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Drastically improved shadow creation time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Constant-time shadow query.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Shadow Mask pre-pass, which removes added VGPR pressure in Deferred Lighting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabling shadow casting no longer requires an editor restart and shader compilation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Substrate",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26122933,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Substrate materials",
      "image": {
        "id": 26122933,
        "file_name": "image90.gif",
        "file_size": 2561874,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T17:31:39.160+00:00",
        "height": 261,
        "width": 600,
        "storage_key": "fec5e9d2-ba48-4c89-8d3d-c4499d2d9e51",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "fec5e9d2-ba48-4c89-8d3d-c4499d2d9e51",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Substrate materials</b>, which are production-ready and enabled by default as of UE 5.7, represent a modular, physically grounded material framework that replaces the fixed shading models with a system designed for expressive control, scalable performance, and long-term flexibility.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "It supports two rendering paths: ",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The <b>Adaptive GBuffer</b>, which enables advanced features like per-pixel topology and layered closures on modern hardware.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The <b>Blendable GBuffer</b>, a simplified fallback that ensures broad platform compatibility.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Nanite Foliage and Skinning (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123007,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Nanite Foliage",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123007,
        "file_name": "image37.gif",
        "file_size": 3070241,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T17:38:44.923+00:00",
        "height": 261,
        "width": 600,
        "storage_key": "864e19a2-1bec-4b3b-a332-12e5a62cfb0c",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "864e19a2-1bec-4b3b-a332-12e5a62cfb0c",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Nanite Foliage</b> is an industry-leading rendering path, which at its core is comprised of three integral systems:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Nanite Assemblies</b>, which manage the foliage part instances into one cohesive unit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Nanite Skinning</b>, which determines the dynamic behavior it will have with systems like wind.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Nanite Voxels</b>, which are pixel sized voxels that are able to retain details, animation and material characteristics based on the distance from the camera, all at a fraction of the original cost.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "When combined, this allows for more robust worlds to be imagined with lifelike and animated foliage that can be delivered within a 60fps budget on current generation hardware.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "New Features:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nanite Assemblies, for building foliage assets using instanced parts to keep asset sizes small.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Blueprint API for building Nanite Assemblies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "As well as in-editor tooling to facilitate Nanite Assembly creation from selections.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Importer support for USD. Exposed USD schemas to use in DCC tools to mark up scenes to import as assemblies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Skeletal Mesh-driven dynamic wind; trees are skeletal meshes and the new Dynamic Wind plugin enables procedural wind to affect their bones.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nanite Voxels, for efficiently rendering foliage geometry in the distance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "TSR Thin Geometry detection to better handle foliage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "SMAA (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Mobile and desktop renderers now support <b>Subpixel Morphological Anti-Aliasing (SMAA)</b>. You can enable it with the mobile renderer using the CVar <code class=\"inline-code\">r.Mobile.AntiAliasing=5</code>, and with the desktop renderer using the CVar \n<code class=\"inline-code\">r.AntiAliasingMethod=5</code>.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This feature improves visual fidelity by providing high-quality edge smoothing with minimal performance impact, it is an efficient technique for mobile games.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SMAA anti-aliasing is enabled on all platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adjust quality settings using <code class=\"inline-code\">r.SMAA.Quality</code>",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adjust edge detection between color or luminance using <code class=\"inline-code\">r.SMAA.EdgeMode</code>",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improve edge smoothness without heavy GPU cost.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Currently an experimental feature. The quality settings provide for tuning tradeoffs between performance or visual fidelity.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "WYvO",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    Character and Animation

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2519,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2048,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Motion Matching Chooser Integration (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "video_id": "V_0ZU7uc",
      "provider": "kaltura",
      "caption": "",
      "autoplay": false,
      "loop": false,
      "width": null,
      "video": {
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "identifier": "V_0ZU7uc"
      },
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "In UE 5.7, we've brought our first iteration of <b>Motion Matching</b> integrated into <b>Choosers</b>! We're doing this because it gives users control over what assets are valid for selection in Motion Matching, something that in previous releases was only possible at the database level, not at the individual asset level.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This means you can search for the best pose, but also filter the per asset results based on extra conditions like game logic through the Chooser.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "A new Pose Search field in the Choosers manages this complexity, along with integrated debugging from Motion Matching into Choosers.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This feature is Experimental.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Blendshapes and Sculpting Tools",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123047,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Blendshapes and Sculpting Tools",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123047,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 1033488,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T18:25:14.294+00:00",
        "height": 994,
        "width": 1600,
        "storage_key": "af36a345-b993-4cec-b75a-24d9d291797f",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "af36a345-b993-4cec-b75a-24d9d291797f",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Bring the flexibility of industry-standard sculpting workflows into Unreal Engine. This is an update on the Skeletal Editor tools that now provides the ability to create and edit morph shapes, bones, and skin weights seamlessly.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Instantly move between placing bones, painting weights, and sculpting blendshapes on a Skeletal Mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "New <b>Morph Target Viewer</b>.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Shapes adapt to changes in mesh topology .",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Equip animators with expressive tools for studio-quality performances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "World Collisions for Control Rig Physics",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123049,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "World Collisions for Control Rig Physics",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123049,
        "file_name": "image88.gif",
        "file_size": 2720969,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T18:29:43.818+00:00",
        "height": 270,
        "width": 480,
        "storage_key": "f97c5a25-e5a2-4963-a0d8-5008a3f97b32",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "f97c5a25-e5a2-4963-a0d8-5008a3f97b32",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Bring level collisions into your Control Rig Physics simulations. Use existing world geometry and physics bodies to create believable contacts, pushes, and interactions.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "World collision support in Control Rig physics with one-way interactions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use level meshes and physics bodies as colliders.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Drive contact with props, floors, and environment during sim and playback.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Control Rig Dependency View",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123051,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Control Rig Dependency View",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123051,
        "file_name": "image35.gif",
        "file_size": 322583,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T18:30:49.551+00:00",
        "height": 484,
        "width": 1051,
        "storage_key": "063c4de8-913c-4c35-8a0c-7ef18dc2a37b",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "063c4de8-913c-4c35-8a0c-7ef18dc2a37b",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Understand how rig elements connect and update over time with a dedicated Dependency View. Visualize relationships between controls, bones, and modules to simplify debugging.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Explore parent-child and metadata relationships at a glance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Debug rigs and modules with clearer visibility into data flow.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Familiar dependency structure visualization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "FBIK and Retargeting Performance",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123052,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "FBIK and Retargeting Performance",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123052,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 408955,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T18:31:34.401+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "2014353d-92d7-4b03-b416-701dcfd75e58",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "2014353d-92d7-4b03-b416-701dcfd75e58",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We added performance improvements and control in Full Body IK and IK Retargeter. This provides a way for you to have performant retargeting at runtime.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improve posing with FBIK without a heavy performance cost (~20% speed increase).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the stretch limb solver in IK Rig for performant runtime retargets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the FK rotation mode <b>Copy Local</b> for faster rotation transfer per chain.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enable performance profiling on the retarget stack.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add a LOD threshold per retarget operator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Better Foot Contact and Proportioned Retargeting",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123165,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Better Foot Contact and Proportioned Retargeting",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123165,
        "file_name": "image64.gif",
        "file_size": 2802725,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T19:41:31.869+00:00",
        "height": 322,
        "width": 592,
        "storage_key": "3aa5e368-1f24-490c-b408-9d59fbbf880b",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "3aa5e368-1f24-490c-b408-9d59fbbf880b",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We improved the IK Retargeter for better handling of ground contact and vast proportioned characters.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This provides a better transfer of animation across a large variety of characters, so you can do faster art direction. You can now do all the following:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Define crotch height to prevent the pelvis from crashing to the ground, and maintain vertical motion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add the floor constraint to feet to maintain vertical position when close to the floor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the FK translation mode <b>Orient and Scale</b> to transfer bone translation data.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add the <b>Stretch Chain</b> operator to match the source retarget chain or scale it.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the <b>Stretch Limb</b> solver to control squash and stretch of limbs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Change the pivot of the <b>Source Scale</b> to a different bone for motion capture or gameplay.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add the <b>Filter Bones</b> operator to remove high frequency noise while retargeting on larger characters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Spatially Aware Retargeting (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123266,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Spatially Aware Retargeting (Experimental)",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123266,
        "file_name": "image51.gif",
        "file_size": 3068156,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T20:10:29.605+00:00",
        "height": 322,
        "width": 741,
        "storage_key": "7663d6ad-8c8d-4c1a-908d-2955e0d1bcba",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "7663d6ad-8c8d-4c1a-908d-2955e0d1bcba",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Spatially Aware Retargeting</b> provides a way for artists to transfer animations between different characters without having to worry about self collision.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This reduces the need to clean up the animation after a retarget.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We added a <b>Body Interactions</b> operator to push IK goals out using physics to prevent self collision.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We added a <b>Relative IK</b> operator to move IK goals relative to contact lengths from the source to the target.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Sequence Validator (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123268,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Sequence Validator (Experimental)",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123268,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 232720,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T20:11:37.493+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "b65fcd33-ae61-4071-b5b0-286fd0964eb6",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "b65fcd33-ae61-4071-b5b0-286fd0964eb6",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The <b>Sequence Validator</b> provides a way for cinematic artists to check if there are any content errors in their sequences. This reduces the amount of potential issues that can happen during a production while working in Sequencer.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Using it, you can:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Queue multiple sequences and their sequence hierarchies for potential issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Check if sections in a sequence are off from the camera cut or playback range.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Check if there are any unassigned bindings or assets on sections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Check if sections start and/or end on whole frames.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Review results and navigate directly to where the problem is in each sequence.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Ease Curve (Beta) and UX Improvements",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123270,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Ease Curve (Beta) and UX Improvements",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123270,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 143346,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T20:12:17.569+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "4d7f7b9b-af72-47fc-8f19-fcc586ac17cd",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "4d7f7b9b-af72-47fc-8f19-fcc586ac17cd",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can now use the <b>Ease Curve</b> tool from Motion Design in Sequencer. You can enable it using the Ease Curve plugin",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Additionally, this update brings more cohesive behaviors for better usability so you can iterate faster.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the Ease Curve tool to apply and save different Ease Curve presets in Sequencer, Curve Editor, and UMG.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adjust scale similar to the Details panel in the Sequencer tree using scale lock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved timeline display of sequence hierarchies to display both current and parent sequence time.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Expand Blueprint and Python capabilities for accessing track states (Solo, Mute, Deactivate, Lock, and Pin).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved transform baking to include time warp.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new <b>Binding ID</b> and <b>Sequence ID</b> columns to the navigation tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The Ease Curve Tool is currently in Beta.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dataless Mutable (Experimental)",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123274,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Dataless Mutable (Experimental)",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123274,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 823935,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T20:14:16.216+00:00",
        "height": 890,
        "width": 1600,
        "storage_key": "4fa976ba-2611-4b95-ba7d-bd7b7907a2a7",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "4fa976ba-2611-4b95-ba7d-bd7b7907a2a7",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Speed up iteration and streamline your workflow with dataless Customizable Objects. Parameter inputs are handled at runtime instead of compile time, giving you faster compiles, better encryption, and smaller packages.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Convert any Customizable Object to dataless.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enjoy faster compile times with runtime parameter handling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use encryption and packaging just like any other UE asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Selection Sets",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123275,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Selection Sets",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123275,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 131298,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T20:15:20.671+00:00",
        "height": 331,
        "width": 611,
        "storage_key": "c84ba3d4-3cc3-4931-91b1-325b9ef5cefb",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "c84ba3d4-3cc3-4931-91b1-325b9ef5cefb",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Animators need quick access to multiple selections throughout their process. This may be multiple controls within one rig, but may also be multiple controls and/or transforms across various assets. Currently animators rely on custom tools like Gui Pickers to do this, so we wanted to build a more native version, similar to popular plugins in other tools.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Animation Mode UX and QOL",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "video_id": "V_zI6k7o",
      "provider": "kaltura",
      "caption": "",
      "autoplay": false,
      "loop": false,
      "width": null,
      "video": {
        "height": 642,
        "width": 1480,
        "identifier": "V_zI6k7o"
      },
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We made improvements to <b>Animation Mode</b>.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Our <b>Constraints</b>, <b>Space Switching</b>, and <b>Snapper </b>tools are now consolidated into one new <b>Constraint</b> window..",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Also related to Constraints, we added a few new options to the creation process.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Current Frame</b>: This is the previous standard functionality. It makes an ON key at the current frame and compensates all keys forward.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>From Start (new)</b>: Takes the current frame's offset and keys it on the first frame of your shot instead of the current frame.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Infinite (new)</b>: Doesn't add keys. Instead, it applies the current frame's offset to the entire sequence.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Pose Library, Tween Tools, Constraints, Selection Sets (new) and Animation Layers now toggle their corresponding windows on or off based on their icon state. Their position and size within your layout is also saved.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can assign toggling these windows to hotkeys.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "lYL6",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    MetaHuman

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2553,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2049,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHuman Creator",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "MetaHuman Creator in Unreal Engine is now available on Linux and macOS, bringing powerful, integrated digital human creation to your preferred platform. If you haven’t already migrated from the MetaHuman Creator web application, follow <a data-document-id=\"3954968\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/metahuman-creator-migration-guide?application_version=5.6\">our migration guide</a> for instructions on how to bring your existing MetaHuman character into Unreal Engine to continue authoring!\n\n",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26244615,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "",
      "image": {
        "id": 26244615,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 1335665,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-11-10T17:00:11.170+00:00",
        "height": 1003,
        "width": 1600,
        "storage_key": "4312e68d-0c2d-47a2-9fb3-bb450bade256",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "4312e68d-0c2d-47a2-9fb3-bb450bade256",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": 600,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We’ve enhanced the <a data-document-id=\"4596991\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/body-conform-controls\">body mesh conformation process</a> with support for varied poses, and introduced UV-space vertex correspondence between the conform template and model meshes – enabling more accurate results with less effort. The parametric body controls are also now more intuitive, making it easier to stay within human proportions with increased precision and control. ",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "With this release you can automate and batch process nearly all editing and assembly operations for MetaHuman character assets <a data-document-id=\"4596440\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/python-scripting-for-metahuman-creator\">using Python</a> or Blueprints. For the first time, more deeply integrate MetaHuman Creator into your pipeline and creative workflow with an API that supports sculpting, conforming, wardrobe, rigging, and textures, streamlining full character assembly.  Preview edits live in MetaHuman Creator, run them interactively in Unreal Editor or a compute farm for offline processing.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHumans in Unreal Engine",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26197405,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "",
      "image": {
        "id": 26197405,
        "file_name": "art3.gif",
        "file_size": 3034845,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-28T15:39:12.528+00:00",
        "height": 466,
        "width": 921,
        "storage_key": "ab987bf8-a6d1-4df9-801b-a3045cda52f9",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "ab987bf8-a6d1-4df9-801b-a3045cda52f9",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": 600,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The Unreal Engine Groom Plugin now enables finer control in <a data-document-id=\"4596400\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/hair-art-directability\">shaping and animating hair strands</a> with a joint-based workflow. You can now blend simulations with art-directed motion, access full use of skeletal mesh animation workflows, and achieve greater artistic freedom with enhanced selection sets and paint tools. The toolset offers full compatibility for MetaHuman grooms originally created in Houdini.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHuman Animator",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Real-time animation from MetaHuman Live Link sources can now be accessed via a Blueprint interface, with <a data-document-id=\"4596401\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/blueprint-examples\">an example graph</a> provided in our documentation.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_table",
      "widths": null,
      "rows": [
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "enhanced_table_header",
              "content": "",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "enhanced_table_header",
              "content": "",
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ],
        [
          [
            {
              "type": "image",
              "image_id": 26197406,
              "caption": "",
              "alt_text": "",
              "image": {
                "id": 26197406,
                "file_name": "Screenshot 2025-10-28 at 09.48.17.png",
                "file_size": 550959,
                "content_type": "image/png",
                "created_at": "2025-10-28T15:42:23.975+00:00",
                "height": 1073,
                "width": 1190,
                "storage_key": "aa693ef9-1aee-43f1-89e7-774c5d398503",
                "context": "documentation"
              },
              "storage_key": "aa693ef9-1aee-43f1-89e7-774c5d398503",
              "context": "documentation",
              "width": 300,
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ],
          [
            {
              "type": "image",
              "image_id": 26197407,
              "caption": "",
              "alt_text": "",
              "image": {
                "id": 26197407,
                "file_name": "Screenshot 2025-10-28 at 09.54.26.png",
                "file_size": 692674,
                "content_type": "image/png",
                "created_at": "2025-10-28T15:42:32.734+00:00",
                "height": 1074,
                "width": 1183,
                "storage_key": "b6f73909-5a48-4787-932c-28140e280bc7",
                "context": "documentation"
              },
              "storage_key": "b6f73909-5a48-4787-932c-28140e280bc7",
              "context": "documentation",
              "width": 300,
              "settings": {
                "is_hidden": false
              }
            }
          ]
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The workflow for <a data-document-id=\"4776600\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/generate-calibration\">generating calibration data</a> from the checkerboard take – captured using a stereo camera pair – has been improved to provide better automatic frame selection, visualization to aid manual frame selection, and repeatable configurations across multiple takes. ",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Combined with the new <a data-document-id=\"4776601\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/calibration-diagnostics-tool\">MetaHuman Animator Calibration Diagnostics plugin</a> (experimental) to validate calibration against performance footage to more easily determine if it is the best calibration to use.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHuman Capture",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We’ve improved the real-time animation options in the Live Link Face <a href=\"https://apps.apple.com/us/app/live-link-face/id1495370836\">iOS</a> and <a href=\"https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.epicgames.facelink\">Android</a> applications by extending the range of supported cameras.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "With Live Link Face, you can now generate real-time facial animation using an external camera on supported Android devices or iPads (Note: Apple's iOS does not support external cameras at this time).  Video can be recorded from an external camera on iPad only.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can also generate animation in realtime by selecting from any on-device camera using Live Link Face on iOS & Android.  Video can be recorded from the on-device camera on iOS only.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHuman for Houdini",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "video_id": "V_3x8YPl",
      "provider": "kaltura",
      "caption": "",
      "autoplay": false,
      "loop": false,
      "width": 500,
      "video": {
        "height": 918,
        "width": 1911,
        "identifier": "V_3x8YPl"
      },
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The latest <a href=\"https://www.fab.com/listings/7bbdfbb5-5eaf-4aa6-b32b-b8b048ebea25\">MetaHuman for Houdini</a> update brings <a data-document-id=\"4596439\" href=\"https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/metahuman/parametric-hairstyle-generator\">parametric groom tools</a>, a guide-driven workflow for creating hairstyles using pre-authored data. The toolset includes a follicle generator to handle density and positioning around the hairline that generates guides based on flow, length, and volume parameters, as well as hair strand interpolation and styling for advanced detailing such as clumpiness.  This is a fast and approachable way to block and iterate new hairstyles.  ",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Meanwhile, for those wanting to learn how to create more advanced hairstyles, we’ve published the new <a href=\"https://www.fab.com/listings/165c4244-482f-4e37-9200-dd782972cdde\">MetaHuman Groom Advanced Kit for Houdini</a> on Fab as an extra learning resource.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<a href=\"https://www.fab.com/listings/7bbdfbb5-5eaf-4aa6-b32b-b8b048ebea25\">MetaHuman for Houdini</a> is now available for Linux.  ",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MetaHuman for Maya",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The latest update to <a href=\"https://www.fab.com/listings/9e3bf55e-d4c3-44fc-a3d4-ec4cb772ec29\">MetaHuman for Maya</a> is available on Linux and introduces support for Maya 2026.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "G6b6",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    Worldbuilding

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2518,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2050,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Custom HLODs",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123701,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Custom HLODs",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123701,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 1324696,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T21:05:42.738+00:00",
        "height": 463,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "74d604f2-8453-41e5-8a0a-dce03d7a35a4",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "74d604f2-8453-41e5-8a0a-dce03d7a35a4",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "When using the provided automatic HLOD generation methods, the output may not always meet the project's requirements and is bound to mesh components.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Custom HLODs</b><b><b></b> support</b> addresses this limitation by giving you the ability to provide your own custom HLOD representations for individual actors or groups of actors.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can use the new World Partition Custom HLOD actor class in two ways:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Inject custom representation directly</b>: You can inject the custom representation as-is into the HLOD runtime partition and optionally use it as input for parent HLOD Layers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Provide a custom source only</b>: You can use the custom representation as input to the HLOD generation process without adding it to the world itself.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "HLODs Setup UX",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26123710,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "HLODs Setup UX",
      "image": {
        "id": 26123710,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 232452,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T21:07:12.960+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "cd130b57-a597-4ee4-8339-4138a2f39fb1",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "cd130b57-a597-4ee4-8339-4138a2f39fb1",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We reworked <b>World Settings &gt; World Partition</b>'s HLODs layers configuration and HLODs layers assets to improve usability when creating or editing a setup.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "26yM",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    Procedural Content Generation (PCG)

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2522,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2051,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "PCG Framework is Production Ready",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26124026,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "PCG Framework is Production Ready!",
      "image": {
        "id": 26124026,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 121855,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-07T21:21:44.346+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "c4b2d3f4-88c2-4d92-a86c-109f29ba1b89",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "c4b2d3f4-88c2-4d92-a86c-109f29ba1b89",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The <b>Procedural Content Generation Framework (PCG)</b> is now Production Ready with the release of UE 5.7.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "While the framework is in continuous development and continues to evolve, we are committed to support a stable environment so all productions can build and rely on this fast and iterative procedural content generation toolset for both runtime and in-editor use cases.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "PCG Editor Mode",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26126268,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "PCG Editor Mode",
      "image": {
        "id": 26126268,
        "file_name": "image42.gif",
        "file_size": 2997361,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:01:00.251+00:00",
        "height": 278,
        "width": 640,
        "storage_key": "1af90ed6-327f-49df-ae70-7b1ba479472c",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "1af90ed6-327f-49df-ae70-7b1ba479472c",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "A new PCG-specific editor tool mode in Unreal Engine is now available. It offers a library of customizable tools leveraging the PCG framework such as draw spline, paint, or create volume, each with an associated PCG Graph and its parameters available for live editing.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can use the provided tool-specific PCG graphs as-is or as examples to create and expand the library for your own needs.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "callout",
      "callout_type": "warning",
      "blocks": [
        {
          "type": "paragraph",
          "content": "\n\nIf you used the UE 5.7 preview, your PCG Editor Mode settings might not have the default setup. If your PCG Editor Mode window does not open and instead shows an error, open the <b>Plugins - PCG Editor Mode Settings</b> in the <b>Editor Preferences</b>, then click <b>Reset to Defaults</b> in the upper right corner.\n\n",
          "settings": {
            "is_hidden": false
          }
        }
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Procedural Vegetation Editor",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "video",
      "video_id": "V_aeUMHJ",
      "provider": "kaltura",
      "caption": "",
      "autoplay": false,
      "loop": false,
      "width": null,
      "video": {
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "identifier": "V_aeUMHJ"
      },
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "The <b>Procedural Vegetation Editor</b> is a new experimental plugin to create and edit vegetation meshes, supporting Nanite foliage, directly within Unreal Engine.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "In this initial release, procedural vegetation assets you create are edited through the Vegetation Editor, a PCG-based node graph editor. Using the provided importer node and skeletal presets distributed in the plugin's content folder, you can:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modify the trees' shape through gravity, carve, and scale operators.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adjust leaves and branches distribution.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Assign different leaf models.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Export to skeletal mesh or static mesh, including support for Nanite foliage assemblies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Create multiple variants through a single node graph or multiple node graphs in order to build a library of unique vegetation meshes for your project.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Assets Workflows",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26126333,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Assets Workflows",
      "image": {
        "id": 26126333,
        "file_name": "image19.gif",
        "file_size": 2902279,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:04:46.638+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "60b901b5-6abf-45e5-9ce5-5d3d0a87bcf7",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "60b901b5-6abf-45e5-9ce5-5d3d0a87bcf7",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "You can now execute PCG graphs as standalone graphs, removing the need for the world context and for the graph to be generated from a PCG component.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "This change adds support for :",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Assets Creation workflows</b>, such as creating meshes using the geometry operations, textures with GPU operations or even generate PCG Data Assets such as attribute set tables by only running a standalone PCG Graph.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Assets Creation tools and plugins built on the PCG framework core</b>, like the new Procedural Vegetation Editor, benefit from its full feature set and future updates.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "To enable PCG graph standalone execution, you can enable a new <b>Is Standalone Graph</b> option is available in each graph's settings. When this option is enabled, you have access to a right click menu <b>Generate Standalone Graph(s)</b> function as well as the possibility to generate, inspect, and debug from the graph editor using a Standalone Graph debug object.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Custom Data Types",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26126382,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Custom Data Types",
      "image": {
        "id": 26126382,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 329383,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:07:10.297+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "e13a1f9c-4d88-4dd0-a616-75e432df5b18",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "e13a1f9c-4d88-4dd0-a616-75e432df5b18",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Since initial release, we hardcoded the list of supported data types in the PCG framework, preventing easy addition and support of new data types when extending the framework or creating interoperations with external plugins.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "In UE 5.7, you can now add support for any custom data type within the types hierarchy and expand the framework, or use the framework core and feature set to build your own tool on top.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We upgraded the type selector as well to better indicate type relationships and provide for multi-selection.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Polygon2D Data Type and Operators",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26126383,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Polygon2D Data Type and Operators",
      "image": {
        "id": 26126383,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 377870,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:07:10.362+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "7b62a031-7df1-4f07-9126-b32b285d966f",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "7b62a031-7df1-4f07-9126-b32b285d966f",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We added a new <b>Polygon2D</b> data type to the list of supported data types in the PCG Framework.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Polygon2D data is useful to represent areas as a closed shape which can be converted to surfaces or splines data, for sampling or for specific operations.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "We added a set of new operators to support this new data type:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Create Polygon 2D</b>: Takes as input point or spline data and converts them into polygon 2D.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Polygon Operations</b>: Allows for polygon-to-polygon operations such\n as intersection, union, and differences. Additionally, polygon 2D can \nbe cut with paths, using splines, to subdivide or isolate shapes. For \nexample, slicing a larger area using spline data in a grid pattern to \ncreate individual city blocks in a city generator graph.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Clip Paths</b>: allows to intersect or difference splines with polygon 2d shapes.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Offset Polygon</b>: applies an offset to the polygon 2d to make them larger or smaller with proper handling of overlaps.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Create Surface From Polygon2D</b>: will turn the polygon 2D into a surface that can be sampled using the Surface Sampler node to create points over its area. ",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "GPU Fast Geo Interop",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26126431,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "GPU Fast Geo Interop",
      "image": {
        "id": 26126431,
        "file_name": "image26.gif",
        "file_size": 2931493,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:15:04.927+00:00",
        "height": 405,
        "width": 720,
        "storage_key": "492f3844-b167-4d9d-badb-b8041a39c59a",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "492f3844-b167-4d9d-badb-b8041a39c59a",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "PCG GPU now leverages FastGeometry components to further improve on game thread performances when using the framework to generate and spawn a high density of static meshes, such as ground scatter and grass. It removes the need for any partition actors and creates local PCG components on the fly.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "To benefit from the improvement, enable the PCG FastGeo Interop plugin in your project and set the CVAR <code class=\"inline-code\">pcg.RuntimeGeneration.ISM.ComponentlessPrimitives</code> to 1.",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "GPU Operators and Improvements",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26127036,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "GPU Operators and Improvements",
      "image": {
        "id": 26127036,
        "file_name": "image79.gif",
        "file_size": 2761180,
        "content_type": "image/gif",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T15:57:00.363+00:00",
        "height": 278,
        "width": 640,
        "storage_key": "2424bed6-535f-4a4a-b1fa-65de1d14b91a",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "2424bed6-535f-4a4a-b1fa-65de1d14b91a",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "autoplay": false,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "New additions to the the PCG Framework GPU compute features set:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Scene Capture</b>: A new node for performing scene captures from the component origin to get and sample the scene color or depth for scattering.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Save Texture to Asset</b>: A new node for baking a PCGTextureData into a UTexture2D asset.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Support for Overrides</b>: parameters overrides are now supported on GPU nodes, including Num Elements counts for custom HLSL nodes.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "Existing native operators upgraded with GPU compute support:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Cull Points Outside Actor Bounds</b>",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Transform Points</b>",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "UX Improvements",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26127154,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "UX Improvements",
      "image": {
        "id": 26127154,
        "file_name": "image.png",
        "file_size": 496750,
        "content_type": "image/png",
        "created_at": "2025-10-08T16:00:46.803+00:00",
        "height": 643,
        "width": 1480,
        "storage_key": "a6fc5335-a851-4c0a-b9ae-0a450c50a9fb",
        "context": "documentation"
      },
      "storage_key": "a6fc5335-a851-4c0a-b9ae-0a450c50a9fb",
      "context": "documentation",
      "width": null,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "As continued UX improvements when working with PCG, these are latest changes:",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "<b>Parameters and Overrides type coloring and validation</b>: Params, override pins, constant output pins and their edges are  all now colored based on their type, matching the Blueprints types colors visual language. When an input can be of any type or is undefined, the pin and edge use white as its display color.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Parameters Min, Max, Units values</b>: You can now configure graph parameters with min/max values and units to display.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "\n<b>Data Viewports Controls</b>: We added additional in-graph editor data viewport controls and options to help preview data in specific contexts.\n\n",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Nodes and Operators",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "image_id": 26127373,
      "caption": "",
      "alt_text": "Nodes and Operators",
      "image": {
        "id": 26127373,
        "file_name": "image.png",
