                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig now only performs one copy of the hierarchy during initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added line trace unit nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added icon to plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Damp and Critical Spring Damp nodes to Control Rig.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Control Rig menu now shows directly in the viewport toolbar instead of being a submenu in the Show menu (eyeball icon).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nodes and hierarchy elements now offers options to find nodes by name locally and globally.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updates to Set Initial Transform from Current and related Commands",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Initial Transform from Current is now only applicable for Bones, Nulls and Connectors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Controls, Set Initial Transform from Current is now Zero Controls.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Controls, Set Initial Transform from Closest Bone is now Zero Controls from Closest Bone, and no longer applicable for Bones, Nulls and Connectors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set Shape Transform from Current is now Zero Control Shape.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved findItemsWithTag to the construction event for performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig curve container undo / redo breaking the curve list",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig editor resetting on compile curve operations made on the curve container (delete, rename, and import).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in Control Rig Pose adapter when removing bones from the skeleton while having a Blueprint with a Control rig opened in the asset editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed AnimNode Control Rig variable mappings initialization at OnInitializeAnimInstance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Control Rig: Need to update Rotation Order table with modular rig updated names.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig Hierarchy updating more transforms than needed in propagate dirty flags function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modular Control Rig",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added twist to legs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed IK/FK naming.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added back public function from arm to leg so it picks up changes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed hind legs ik fk.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed leg and arm softness to off by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed socket tooltip in Spine.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed HindLeg FK controls not rotating.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed AnimalNeck stretch.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Shoulder backwards solve by parenting to chest null instead of body ctrl.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed HindLeg to always use connectors for creation instead of parent lookup.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The editor now retains the Rig Solve Mode after compiling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Control Rig control module iterator lambda parameters creating copies of some expensive objects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix for client crash in FRigUnit_HierarchyInstantiateFromPhysicsAsset, due to Modular Control Rig object overrides getting garbage collected.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ControlRig Hierarchy serialization not storing the previous hierarchy name map.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in Control Rig editor when the preview floor mesh is not available, now it will trigger an error log and continue to load the asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoid a crash in Control Rig when adding an empty rule to a connector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an editor undo redo in an AnimBPs that contains a Control Rigcrash, when performing a redo of a previously-undone SetPreviewMesh transaction.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim In Engine: Rotator control keys are retained in Sequencer when the controls are changed to transform controls in the rig.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Need to update Constraint Channels with updated Modular rig names, or constraints come in broken.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ControlRig editor not executing post undo for the transient editor preview actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed undo / redo crash in Control Rig hierarchy mappings, when undoing across a construction transaction.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Converted HandleExecutionReachedExit event to function callback, to avoid worker thread contention.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ControlRig spawn control node details panel not generating the shape name list as a combo box.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in ControlRig when expanding a function reference from a different graph that contains a private function inside. Now the user will receive a localize request to make a local copy of the function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed RigVM local variable customization not showing value for local variables not used in the graph and losing value after compiling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Deformer Graph",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding Deformer dynamically in Control Rig was changed to use Async Loading to avoid hitches when the Deformer loads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled Compute Framework/Deformer Graph on mobile platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed SkinWeightAsVertexMask Date Interface providing incorrect data when a non-default skin weight profile is used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed skeletal meshes getting invalid tangents when using deformer graph with opengl_es31.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed wrong category for a few deformer functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a pre-built dual quat deformer that supports both morph and cloth.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure skin weight profiles are requested earlier so that we can avoid T-Pose on the frame that the deformer becomes active / LOD changes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed copy pasting resource node with matrix3x4 type creating a node with no pin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an ensure related to deformer graph instance settings in packaged build caused by incorrect object name used when creating the settings object.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Gameplay",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Make Motion Warping switchoff conditions and warp target direction mode experimental as these APIs will change in future.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for animation mirroring to UAF.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note this is a first pass and not fully matching Animation Blueprint's capabilities yet.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new version of AddAnimationNotifyEvent() that supports blueprint exposed data from notify events.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This helps prevent data loss when copying/duplicating animation notify events.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add SmoothWalkingMode to Mover2.0",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added base class SimpleWalkingMode to help make writing walking modes easier.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed AnimationMath -&gt; SpringMath and made public Rename SpringWalkingMode -&gt; SimpleSpringWalkingMode.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Velocity Spring functions to SpringMath Add character prediction functions to SpringMath.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added documentation to SpringMath.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for PoseSearchDatabase searches returning multiple results",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added experimental support to the motion matching node (FAnimNode_MotionMatching) for interaction searches (multi character motion matching, to mimic FMotionMatchingTrait).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a custom make bp function for FMotionWarpingTarget to ensure that the custom actor is called to calculate the target transforms when a component is passed as an input.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The ChooserTable randomization column can now keep track of multiple recently selected entries and reduce the probability of reselecting them.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new Chooser table column type (FPoseSearchColumn) to support motion matching searches within chooser evaluations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add a spring walking movement mode to Mover named \"SimpleSpringWalkingMode\". This uses a critically damped velocity spring model to translate and rotate the character.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed UE 5.5 deprecations from PoseSearch plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed anim to texture editor functions as a public interface.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add threadsafe method for getting curve asset float & vector values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UE::PoseSearch::SDatabaseAssetListItem potentially referencing a deleted asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when opening the PoseSearchInteractionAsset editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FSearchContext::GetSampleRotationInternal and FAssetIndexer::GetSampleRotation not properly calculating the rotation relative to their reference bone.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed motion matching tracing during throttled or skipped searches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Stored FBlendStackAnimPlayer::StoredAttributes as FMeshAttributeContainer instead of FHeapAttributeContainer to support animation LOD changes in blend stack.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a pose search database indexing crash when using a UAnimNotifyState_PoseSearchSamplingAttribute referencing a bone that is missing from any channel included in the pose search schema.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed root motion sampling in blend stack.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the motion warping switchoff condition to use the correct target transform when component following ends.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in UPoseSearchFeatureChannel_Phase::IndexAsset when indexing assets with a single pose, usually caused by a very short animation in a pose search database.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UPoseSearchDatabase::SynchronizeWithExternalDependencies mistakenly synchronizing transient assets into a database, leading to reference garbage collected assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed notify guids from Pose Search Database hash generation, otherwise the hash can be non-deterministic.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in FAsyncPoseSearchDatabasesManagement::CollectDatabasesToSynchronize with Objects with invalid Object-&gt;GetClass().",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the Alias state nodes not working with getters like GetRelevantAnimTime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated UPoseSearchDatabase TArray AnimationAssets in favor of TArray DatabaseAnimationAssets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated UPoseSearchLibrary::UpdateMotionMatchingState.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "ML Deformer",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hide certain conflicting properties (categories even) from the advanced preview scene settings tab. This was needed because the MLD asset editor has its own mesh picking and animation playback. Changing those properties inside the preview settings tab would mess things up. So we now hide those specific conflicting settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Make curves work with UAF.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for copy paste between input bone and curve lists.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Means users can copy/paste the input lists from one model to the other.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "You can now right click the input list widgets and choose Copy and Paste.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a few bugs in the tooltips as well as unique curve group name generation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved the UX a bit by setting a minimum height for the bone, curve, bone group and curve group widgets and some context menu improvements.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed some UI refresh issues as well when adding bones or curves. Curve group and bone group coloring did not refresh properly.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved performance of the asset editor. Improved responsiveness to property changes, faster loading, faster sampling of anims.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new console command \"MLDeformer.DebugDrawInputPoses\" which will draw the input pose to the ML Deformer. It can be useful to quickly visually see what meshes have ML Deformers on them, and what bones are included.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GeomCache: Some improvements to the memory management. Prevented reallocs, resulting in faster performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a problem where training with curves would cause a failure during training.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where curves on the skeletal mesh instead of on the skeleton would cause some error checking to fail.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when adding a bone to the inputs of the ML Deformer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash on undo on morph based models. Also changed the icon of the Train button.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed python errors when launching with \"-game\" as argument.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug when training, related to masks of input animations. Training would fail with some error right after sampling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved the tick group from pre physics to post physics.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a VertexDeltaModel python import error. This was because an import should have been inside the Train function, but it was in global scope.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed async loading issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Some fixes where it would not detect curves.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Physics Control",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now supports using a mask when invoking control profiles, which means they can be applied to a subset of the character.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Additional support for specifying control/modifier set names in function calls.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Kinematic targets are now specified the same way across PhysicsControlComponent, RigidBodyWIthControl and ControlRigPhysics.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed duplication of the Linear/AngularTargetVelocityMultiplier and TargetVelocityMultiplier parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "General minor fixes/improvements to the physics control asset editor, including a fix for a potential crash.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Runtime",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added pinning and toolbar to workspace viewport and remove scene description tab.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now supports drag/dropping multiple bones in the abstract skeleton binding editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Bone items can now be dropped onto non-set items in the abstract skeleton set binding editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a filter for attributes to anim asset browser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Initialize as a default implemented event in the UAF module.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "State Machine: Self transitions & UX improvements:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Self transitions and state re-entry are now possible.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Re-entering a state uses inertial blending and requires an inertialization node. Old content will not use the new re-entry feature but any newly built content, when re-entering a state, will create an error if an inertialization node is not present root-wards in the graph.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The target state must enable bAlwaysResetOnEntry for the inertial blend to trigger.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "To aid with managing state-reentry, a new MinTimeBeforeReentry value has been added to transitions.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added 'reverse transition' context menu option that just reverses the direction of transitions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Relinking transitions to other states can now be performed from the transition tail as well as the head.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "State alias list is now sorted alphabetically to make finding states easier.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Look and feel of state machines has been tweaked & improved.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now uses SVG brushes to better scale.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Different node types (states, aliases and conduits) now have different shapes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Transitions now rotate to follow their direction and have been moved closer together and closer to their link line.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Transitions now sort in front of states.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Links are now further apart and scale correctly with zoom level.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Selection of links now scales correctly with zoom level.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Details panels for states now show the anim node functions for their result node and have been rearranged.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added 'force transition' option to the context menu for state machines that are currently being debugged.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made machine entry nodes non-deletable.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Extended the Create Asset menu to allow non-asset menu entries for wizards that create potentially multiple assets of various types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a picker widget for animation attributes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added toggle to blend layer trait to blend in mesh space.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added live updating blend mask weights in the profile blend node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated animation blueprint interface icon in the 'My Blueprint' tab to show as blue when the function has been implemented.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed Curve Metadata API on the Skeleton to Blueprint and Python. This includes functions to query, add, remove and rename curve metadata as well as querying and setting material and morph target flags.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled adding set bindings without a set collection set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a viewport to the workspace for UAF.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Paused preview animation while manipulating transform widget in animation editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an asset wizard for help authoring UAF content.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added foundations for the abstract skeleton runtime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added editors for the abstract skeleton assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added functionality to Open in New Tab via the context menu for collapsed nodes and function nodes in UAF",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed collapsed nodes and functions in UAF workspaces being opened without context of their outer, leading to loss of access to variables.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed debug only assert when opening items via double click the workspace outliner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a missing drag-drop op for adding attributes to sets in the set collection editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Caught a situation where the mesh asset in InitializeAnimScriptInstance is invalid. Also dealt with possible parallel anim eval tasks being in flight.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when trying to create a new UAF Workspace instead of picking an existing one when prompted to choose a workspace after opening a newly created UAF Graph.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed slow document navigation in the workspace editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when attempting to add an existing curve attribute to abstract skeleton binding.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed being able to rearrange a trait onto itself.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed for animation modifiers not reverting correctly and crashing in some instances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when re-removing a pin on a blend multi node after undoing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a broken root motion extraction during animation modifier evaluation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a regression in root motion extraction which prevented animation modifiers from reading raw uncompressed data during the compilation process, causing them to fail",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing text localization in pose asset widget.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SkeletonCompatibility: Fixed a problem when using compatible skeletons where we could end in a situation where the source skeleton did not have a bone of the target skeleton, which could lead to a crash.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "RBAN: Ensure RBAN doesn't write NaNs into the pose.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed visualization of what the blend weight of the animation is in Animation Insights for Random Sequence Player. Now it takes the overall blendweight of the animation into account as well.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the look at edit mode locator gizmo not updating location when changes are made in the details panel",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim State Machine:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed incorrect duplicate GUID warning when a transition rule is shared.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Prevented renaming states to 'None'.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed copy-paste of transition nodes creating duplicate GUIDs/assets.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed clamping values preventing manual entering of valid negatives.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Sequence: Fixed thumbnail scene references preventing deletion when assets contain notify states.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Assets: Fixed a crash when creating a preview scene for assets with a deleted compatible skeleton.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the animation sequence segment length",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a button in the montage editor not working due to property access type mismatch",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SkeletalMeshComponent: Fix meshes getting ticked offscreen incorrectly when using montage-related visibility options",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed pose history and trajectory history desync by delta time, causing incorrect results especially noticeable when the component transform makes large translation and rotation, e.g. a 180 pivot.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a bug with bad pivot selection when the capsule rotation flips",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect timings on trajectory history when delta time is not constant.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed duplicate trajectory entries around t = deltatime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the set collection editor not updating when renaming a set, and added rename to the context menu.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the expansion state of tree items resetting when drag/dropping a bone in the abstract skeleton binding editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed drag-dropping segments into composite track not matching selection order.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed window scaling issue when dragging multiple notifies in the animation editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed check to ensure in SkeletalMeshComponent to avoid crash using rewind debugger.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed many SAssetShortcuts unnecessarily refreshing on asset opening resulting in slow ABP navigating.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Animation Budget Allocator: Enabled component tick when unregistering.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the animation attribute functions to not allow adding an attribute with a name that already exists.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim BP: Fix cook non-determinism with generated 'mutables' struct",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Instance: Fix memory leak when GC-ing both mesh & anim instance in the same pass.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with tooltip names in SOverrideStatusWidgets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "AnimSequence: Fix uninitialized pose transforms being generated in some circumstances",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "PropertyAccess: Fix memory leak when calling functions via property access that return non-POD values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim Decompression: Removed usage of deprecated GetCompactPoseIndexFromSkeletonIndex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed copying notifies when duplicating an anim sequence so the new notifies no longer reference the old sequence.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the UAF asset wizard template assets being visible in the content browser and selectable in the workspace picker etc.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added more inline crash details when invalid values are found in animation poses.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "PropertyAccess: Hardened GetAccessAddress in case of unexpected data.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SkeletalMeshComponent: Fixed a crash when calling SetAnimInstanceClass during a notify callback.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Triggered caching of all otherwise lazily computed data when a DNA is loaded from a binary stream, which can avoid potential race conditions if the same DNA reader is utilized in a multithreaded environment.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed not being able to move nodes within newly created comment nodes in Control Rig and UAF.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed deprecated Skeleton Compatibility code from the Skeleton class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed deprecated Curve code from the Skeleton class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed deprecated Mesh Linkup Caching code from the Skeleton class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Sequencer",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Property tracks can now be renamed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note, the tooltip will still show the actual name of the property being animated.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added setting to always stop when going to playback start or end.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Sequencer Navigator: There are now columns for the sequence ID and the object binding ID which are useful for debugging purposes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Take Recorder: Add a cvar TakeRecorder.AllowPossessablePIEObjects to bypass disallowing recording PIE objects as possessables. The default is to not allow this (no change in behavior). This can be useful when recording a player pawn.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added scripting to text",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ISequenceVisitor callbacks for when the visit enters/exists a sub-sequence",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The camera cut track now supports multiple rows. When multiple rows exist, the camera cut track does not try to auto arrange sections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MovieScene: Exposed FLevelSequencePlaybackContext to other modules.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hot key scrubbing will continue playing if Sequencer was playing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Preview camera cuts in simulate. This also lets users enable/disable seeing camera cuts in PIE after ejecting from the player controller.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The colors for the playback start/end range can now be customized by user settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for notification callbacks when animating properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The timeline in the cinematic viewport now respects the snapping behaviors of the Sequencer timeline.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added fixes and improvements to the time space display. The desired time space and the local time space are now both drawn.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Bake Transform now has an option to bake with time warp applied.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Attach sections with Preserve None now default to infinite duration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "'Bake Animation Sequence' and 'Create Linked Animation Sequence' actions in Sequencer now remember the last folder that was used in the current Editor run.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Bake Transform is now available in the Template Sequence and Camera Animation Sequence Editors",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The subsequence section's Origin Override Location/Rotation now respect the default float/double spinbox incremental behaviors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Sequences: Add PlayReverse function to actor sequence components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Editing scale channels in the Sequencer Key Details now has an option to preserve the scale ratio",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Save As is now available in the Template Sequence and Camera Animation Sequence Editors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the ability to get and set Mute Nodes, Solo Nodes, Deactivated Nodes, Locked Nodes, Pinned Nodes, and Binding Tags in Blueprints/python.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The view and working ranges are no longer saved with the asset. Every time you open a level sequence, it will be zoomed to the playback range.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Duplicate keys are now removed on mouse release",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Update tooltip to \"The interpolation type for the initial keyframe\" to clarify that this is only for the first keyframe on the track/section",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UE_API all blueprint exposed functions for Sequencer Scripting",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored track instance bindings and added the concept of \"volatile\" paths to fix possible memory stomps when animating array items or instanced structs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where when changing shots we could sometimes get one frame of t-pose on a character when using bForceCustomMode. The issue was that we were checking for custom mode too late in the frame relative to when we were potentially doing the binding to a custom anim instance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the color not reverting when pressing cancel on the color picker.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an adjustment for an issue for capturing thumbnails for sequences. Renders at a square aspect ratio and cleans up some advanced rendering features to create the cleanest image possible like materials.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When opening a sequence, the playback mode is now set to loop selection range if a selection range is set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the BakeToControlRig function. Now fetches the templateID for the sequence that we're in so that if the sequence we are working on is a nested, instance, or template sequence we can resolve objects within the function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for indirect gizmo manipulation of sub track offsets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for animating property bag properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a possible GC leak with UMG animations. It happened when using an event track, and the widget is removed from its parent while the animation is playing, and then the inactive widgets pool is discarded and GC'ed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Sequencer Navigator: The marks column now properly updates when marks are changed/added/removed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exporting a binding that doesn't have a valid spawnable template no longer crashes",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a GC error in restore state of skeletal mesh animation track.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Properly implemented end-at-time feature.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now stores camera shake previewers as shared pointers because FGCObject classes are not relocatable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Material Parameter Collection track display name so that it's not set explicitly on creation. Instead, the display name is just the name of the MPC if the user hasn't changed it. This allows the user to change the MPC and the name will automatically change.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Proxy bindings no longer allow you to mistakenly pick the same actor it is a proxy for.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Key selection is no longer emptied when right clicking on the timeline.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMovieSceneSequence: Fixed nullptr crash.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed pre-roll/post-roll sometimes still evaluating sections that aren't set to evaluate there.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer falls back to the double blender system when a property doesn't have blending information. Instead, it falls back to the fast path where we don't blend anything.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed broken support for ping-pong playback when we only cross the loop boundary once.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the pre-animated state being incorrectly saved as \"persistent\" for root tracks.",
