                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for the user presence extension, which tells us whether the hmd is being worn if the platform supplies that information.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed the previous implementation which attempted to drive the worn state from other openxr state transitions. This had inconsistent and sometimes broken behavior across platforms.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replace xr.MobileLDRDynamicResolution with a new CVar, xr.MobilePrimaryScalingMode, which controls whether primary scaling is redirected to the HMD runtime (which will always use spatial scaling) when it would otherwise be unsupported.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Options are:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "0: Never",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "1: DynRes Only (default)",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "2: Always.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated device profiles for standalone XR devices. They no longer inherit from each other in sequence, and the new Android_OpenXR device profile matches the Quest 3 profile which has had its shadow quality increased for dynamic shadows to draw by default in Mobile Preview and on Device. Consider lowering this value if dynamic shadows are not required.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved expose passthrough support via the editor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new UENUM for environment blend modes, EOpenXREnvironmentBlendModeUpdate SetEnvironmentBlendMode() node to accept EOpenXREnvironmentBlendMode.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new GetEnvironmentBlendMode() node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new GetSupportedEnvironmentBlendModes() node, which returns supported blend modes in an array in order of runtime preference (highest to lowest).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new IsCompositionLayerInvertedAlphaEnabled() node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an xr.OpenXRInvertAlpha checkbox to the OpenXR plugin settings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an r.Mobile.PropagateAlpha checkbox to the Engine-&gt;Rendering-&gt;Mobile settings",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed OpenXRHMDSettings to OpenXR Settings, since it controls settings for the entire module.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "OpenXR is now building for all platforms:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The platform specificity of the openxr plugins and modules was problematic because content derived from these would not load on non-xr platforms for projects that are meant to be cross platform.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "OpenXR is not actually platform dependent. It can be implemented on any platform. If it is present as a fully independent openxr runtime a small amount of platform specific code is needed to implement an openxr loader.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It is also possible to create an unreal plugin which either acts as an openxr runtime or is able to find an openxr runtime.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The plugins are still disabled by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed permissions not allowed by Quest App Store.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed various debug draw elements failing to render when using Instanced Stereo or Mobile Multi-View:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "r.VisualizeOccludedPrimitives",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "ShowFlag.Bones",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "DrawDebugBox and other similar calls, excluding DrawDebugString.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix a bug where late update camera movements were not accounted for when calculating scene visibility, causing smearing, latency, or other artifacts when some rendering features were used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed GetHMDData TrackingStatus field:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It was only checking if the hmd device tracking handle was valid, needs to check if the hmd is actually tracked.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It was also attempting to use the camera position rather than the hmd tracking position.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed GetMotionControllerData and FXRMotionControllerData which were deprecated in 5.5.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added handtracking permissions for Quest.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed OpenXR AddProfile for input always being given true rather than the passed in bHasHaptics parameter.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when using the SteamVR runtime with Vulkan.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed MetalViewport SubmitImmersive: [IOGPUMetalCommandBuffer setProtectionOptions:]:585: failed assertion `setProtectionOptions: with uncommitted encoder'",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Visionos cp_frame_query_drawable null handling:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We abandon the frame if the drawable is null, this indicates that the app is either being paused or exited.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Essentially we just continue the frame but don't call the cp_ functions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "At the beginning of the next frame we handle the state change.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deleted the formerly deprecated functions from 5.3 to remove references to the UPlayerMappableInputConfig type.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Platform Mobile",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Android",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added -FastIterate flag to Visual Studio/Rider/Quick Launch, to have libUnreal.so outside the APK, and made build iteration faster in general.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added -AndroidStudio flag to GenerateProjectFiles that generates a Gradle project that wraps around the original Gradle project that is suitable for use in Android Studio.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Android Vulkan detection logic now uses the same VkApplicationInfo parameters (e.g. App name, Engine version) as used by the VulkanRHI initialization, so graphics drivers that need to opt out of Vulkan for Unreal Engine apps can do so consistently.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented support for factoring screen rounded edges in computing the safe zone. The implementation means users can align the safe zone horizontally or vertically to the rounded edge excluded areas or to an average of both.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, cleaned up current safe zone implementation to determine size relative to the main view instead of the display as the system may reduce the main view to exclude cutout areas.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Constrained kotlin stdlib dependencies to &gt;= 1.8.0 to fix building issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Recompiled libopenxr_loader with 16kb page support based on NDK 27.2.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed need for security token for debuggable applications when using AndroidFileServer with UnrealAndroidFileTool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added warning if a library on Android is not 16kb page size compatible.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed bashrc/bash_profile related code, instead using zshrc for Mac as primary source of environment variables.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Report resident size of \"libUnreal.so+base.apk+[anon:.bss]+[anon:linker_alloc]\" as ProgramSize on Android.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Report resident size of all memory mapped files as MMIO on Android.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Tag all virtual memory with \"UE\" VMA tag on Android.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the vkquality 1.2.2 library which can be used as another data point as to whether to select Vulkan or OpenGL ES.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The result of the vkquality check is returned in the SRC_VKQuality that can be queried by the Android device profile selector rules.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated AutoSDK \"MinVersion\" to NDK r27c.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved AndroidFileServer (AFS) file transfer - retries and resumes for file push to device.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Resolves potential sync issue that leaves the EditBox non responsive to text input and the keyboard in a state where it doesn't get dismissed its the 'Done' button.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, replaced setVisibility with add/remove View to work around an Android level spam issue when keyboard is repeatedly dismissed/invoked.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved Android Camera Player with the Android Camera2 APIs and support for Vulkan frame data processing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Default NDK is updated to r27c, buildtools to 35.0.1, bundletool to 1.18.1.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Recompiled libopenxr_loader with 16kb page support based on NDK 27.2.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced libhwcpipe with C wrapped .so to avoid C++ STL ABI conflicts on Android.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now starts loading libUnreal dependencies early for faster startup time",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Created Android-arm64/x64 configs in Visual Studio.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made Quick Launch now build an x86_64 binary when launching on x86_64 devices, such as the emulator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lowered Android SDK \"MaxVersion\" to NDK r28c, due to NDK r29 compiler bug.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Update GooglePAD to 1.15.4 / 2.3.0.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added engine device profiles for Mali-G1-Ultra and similar devices.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now detect devices using the ANGLE OpenGL ES driver and use the Vulkan deviceName string for SRC_GPUFamily. This means the device profile Vulkan selection can continue to match the same string as used when the device is in native OpenGL ES mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled desugar for older Android support.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Filtered out AFSProject task if running it from Gradle (prevent second run).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured java sources are wiped when FirebaseEnabled is toggled off. Otherwise, source files are left behind that don't compile as the Java dependencies don't get populated by the plugin when FirebaseEnabled = false.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, registerBuildSettiings for the Firebase settings referenced from the plugin's UPL.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the timing of firing the MediaOpened event in Android Camera Player.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the issue that the Console Command input is disabled when \"Show Launch Image\" is off in Project Settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured keyboard OnTextCommitted messages are dispatched when using Android improved virtual keyboard.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured nativeKeyboardInputResult is invoked when keyboard is dismissed and keeps the reference to VirtualKeyboardWidget valid until the result is handled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Corrected issue with file locking in UnrealAndroidFileTool for writes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed black screen when playing start movies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a watch for deletion complete before database close in Fetch2 (part of background downloading).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved early load sync point to prevent possible crash due to an ordering issue.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made NDK toolchains detection for manual SDK installs more robust.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made JAVA_HOME environment setting for manual SDK installs more robust.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing setting of ndkPath to Gradle property value",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed generated install scripts with overflow OBBs that are broken on non-Windows",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Breakpad dump_syms with version supporting compressed symbols.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added catching of UnsatisfiedLinkError in GameApplication.LoadLibraries, in case some other ClassLoader has already loaded them",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the WebView freeze when switching the game to the background while loading a URL.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed VersionScriptFile not being created robustly, sometimes causing build failures.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Worked around a Gradle bug whereby when only assets change, it attempts to patch the existing APK from previous packaging by adding asset deltas resulting in growth of the final APK payload. Workaround is detection of changes to assets and wiping the existing APK to force Gradle to repackage it correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a Java exception when closing the Camera Device during initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the \"Play On Open\" feature for the Android Camera Player.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the keyboard EditBox layout on devices with cutout when the cutout area isn't used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "getWindowVisibleDisplayFrame returns a rectable in screen space, however, the edit box coordinates need to be provided in the main decor view's space.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "As such, translate the results of getWindowVisibleDisplayFrame to the decor view's space by translating these by the decor view's screen position.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "libGPUCounters: Android early crash fix libGPUCounters is built with statically linked libc++, exposing a bunch of std symbols, which override those in libUnreal.so.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For example, it overrides std::to_string leading to an early crash:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Other plugin calls to_string (uses libGPUCounter implementation and its operator new & memory alloc).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "That string is later destructed, using engine's operator delete.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Our allocator fatals on unrecognized pointer.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The fix is to add a linker version script to the libGPUCounters build and only expose C API related symbols as global.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Android TargetSDK Fix templates with AFS configuration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Fetch2 3.3.0 with new version of androidx.room 2.7.1 (used for background downloading).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added detection of SQL lock error on enqueue (can happen after deleteAll in Fetch2 background downloading).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new dump_syms_comp.exe supporting compressed Symbols for Android use.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with assets with starting offset other than 0.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made MakeApk do a clean during packaging if EnableBundle is flipped between builds.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash from pending JNI exception in non-Shipping builds, when skipping over checks.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now round rather than truncate Android getRefreshRate when converting to integer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the freeze of Android Media Player playback on Xiaomi 13T or devices with a similar chipset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TargetSDK 35 compatibility issues with background downloading.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer requests WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permission if TargetSDK doesn't support non-scoped storage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that keyboard dismissed isn't called when the text input is accepted by the Virtual Keyboard's done key or a physical keyboard's enter key.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, ensured that on dismissal of the virtual keyboard, text entry type is Canceled so that text committal only triggers if the widget is configured with behaviour 'Text commit on Dismiss'.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "iOS, tvOS, and iPadOS",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "IOS: Notification about network path characteristic FIOSPlatformMisc::OnNetworkConnectionCharacteristicsChanged can be used to know about network characteristic changes, e.g. knowing if a new connection is constrained or expensive.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Re-enabled SetBytes and SetBufferOffset on iOS and enable on tvOS.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for Xcode26.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The IOS rotation code now defers applying a new rotation until after we have rendered a new frame in the new orientation, for both auto-rotation and programmatic orientation selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes the issue with a squashed aspect ratio when the user rotates the app at a time we cannot immediately render a new frame, such as during loading.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now ask for background time on iOS until all delegates called from applicationWillEnterBackground are invoked.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disallowed resolve of R32F MSAA targets as this format isn't MSAA resolvable in Metal.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additionally, make the texture memoryless as we'll never be resolving to it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed network changed delegate for iOS.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented functionality for -MetalPSOCache=use.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deferred handling of notifications if the engine isn't ready to receive.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Occlusion Query Helpers now correct the number of frames for Metal mobile platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured valid URL for pipeline cache save location.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The current invalid URL generated was invalid as it was constructing a file URL using the absolute string of another URL as a path parameter to the constructor, causing MTLBinaryArchive-&gt;serializeToURL to crash when used.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now store webauth credentials in iOS keychain using a key that does not change after uninstalls.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed some memory leaks in the iOS web browser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Rendering",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Architecture",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Virtual Texture:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed \"r.VT.Support16BitPageTable\" to \"r.VT.PageTableMode\".",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The setting can now be modified live at run time instead of being read only.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Also removed \"r.VT.SplitPhysicalPoolSize\" which now corresponds to setting \"r.VT.PageTableMode=2\".",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unified mip color debug display for Virtual Textures.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "\"r.VT.RVT.MipColors\" is deprecated and Runtime Virtual Textures now respect \"R.VT.Borders\" which other Virtual Textures already use.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "\"r.VT.Borders\" is no longer on/off. The value now sets the debug border texel width.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Also added \"r.VT.Borders.Mip\" which isolates the mode to a single mip level.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Release/Recycle Virtual Texture spaces after they are unused for some time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "We don't release immediately to avoid cases during loading where this might trigger unnecessary Recreate/Resize work.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The old behavior was to never Release/Recycle unless we ran out of space slots.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added \"r.VT.SpaceReleaseFrames\" to control this. The default is to release after 150 frames. Setting to -1 will return to the old behavior.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed draw behavior for selected meshes which only write to Runtime Virtual Texture.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Previously we would fully show those meshes on selection (they are hidden in the main pass otherwise).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now we only show the selection outline.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Runtime Virtual Texture:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The display name of the \"Virtual Texture Builder\" (also sometimes previously known as \"SVT\") asset is now \"Streaming Runtime Virtual Texture\" (i.e. SRVT). This avoids confusion with Sparse Volume Texture (SVT).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It can now be created from the content browser.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevent StreamingTexture from being carried over when duplicating a RVT component (Save As, copy/paste...).  This avoids the common mistake of using another map's SRVT after a Save As.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added optional Z-increment parameter to FPixelShaderUtils::AddRasterizeToRectsPass, in order to control the Z of the quads (Z = quad index, i.e. instance id * ZIncrement). Combined with depth test enabled, this enables making the rasterization deterministic in case of overlapping quads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Runtime Virtual Texture preload requests now work for the adaptive page table case.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed programmatic RenderDoc captures randomly crashing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed non DBuffer mesh decals not obeying the mesh component \"Receive Decals\" setting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Lighting",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled VSM receiver masks for directional lights by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "~10MB memory overhead (depending on settings/scalability).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Often fairly significant performance improvements in uncached cases with lots of dynamic geometry.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled the selection of Virtual Textures on Rect Light components. These have never been supported in a cooked build, but were still shown in the Editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed Max Draw Distance and Max Distance Fade Range to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now store and propagate \"cleared\" flags to avoid reclearing pages we never wrote into; particularly relevant for receiver mask where we treat all dynamic pages as uncached but often don't write into them all.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer allocate unnecessary receiver mask space if local light receiver masks are disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored VSM ID allocation so that we can control the order more consistently. The immediate goal is to guarantee that directional lights get allocated first so that we can easily allocate receiver masks just for directional lights without the memory overhead of doing it for all local lights as well",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TexCreate_3DTiling flag to volume textures in TranslucentLighting to reduce memory and boost performance on some platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked r.UseClusteredDeferredShading and r.Mobile.UseClusteredDeferredShading as deprecated and added notification about future removal. Clustered deferred shading will be removed in a future release due to lack of utility to reduce maintenance burden.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrectly reported one pass projection overflow with megalights active. Only run VSM coarse page marking once when there are multiple views as it is view-independent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Scale the light fade range by `GLightMaxDrawDistanceScale` to avoid lights becoming too dim at lower scales.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Lumen",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled half res integration on High scalability (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.StochasticInterpolation 2).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can soften normals in indirect lighting, and make GI a bit more noisy.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "On the other hand it saves ~0.5ms on console at 1080p, which feels like a right tradeoff for High scalability intended for 60hz on console.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lumen Screen Probe Gather: Bent Normal Integration improvements (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ApplyDuringIntegration 1)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.FoliageOcclusionStrength.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed EvaluateSHIrradiance which was causing brightening in corners.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed double AO apply during bent normal integration. Now instead of applying AO for the second time we apply only the GI approximation using AOMultiBounce, as DistantIlluminationRescale was too strong.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Clamp decoded AO as it could be larger than 1 causing too strong indirect specular occlusion.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now support ShouldApplyDuringIntegration when Screen Probe Gather Integration and Short Range AO downsample factors match.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed artifacts when ShortRangeAO is disabled, but ShouldApplyDuringIntegration is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lumen HWRT path now supports split screen.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "R.LumenScene.DumpStats 3 will now dump primitive culling information. This is useful, as it merges instances into a single entry making it easier to read the log.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved GBuffer tile classification out into a single pass, which is also storing opaque history for the next frame. This pass is reused across Lumen and MegaLights for better performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Screen tile marking optimizations, which speed up reflections, GI, and water reflections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Tweaked default settings:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs 0 - SWRT detail traces (mesh SDF tracing) is now a deprecated path, which won't be worked on much. For scaling quality beyond SWRT global traces it is recommended to use HWRT path instead.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRayIntensity 10 - firefly filtering is now more aggressive by default. This removes some interesting GI features, but also reduces noise, especially from things like small bright emissives",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing subsurface energy by removing extra divide by PI. Now an emissive card matches a rect light reference of the same irradiance. This bug was only affecting Epic scalability (r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IrradianceFormat 0 path).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug on Mac platforms when running on SM5 using R11G11B10 for Typed UAV's causing rendering corruption.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix visual artifacts and out of memory reads/writes when using non power of 2 Tracing Octahedron Resolution. Now Tracing Octahedron Resolution is always clamped to valid input values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nanite Skeletal Mesh now supports bHasRayTracingRepresentation, so that those primitives can be skipped from Lumen under certain conditions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape culling stealing the r.Lumen.DiffuseIndirect.Allow's on changed callback. This is not needed anymore since this CVar's callback already invalidates all components, including landscape ones.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed tile artifacts on indirect specular on cloth pixels in the same tiles as hair pixels",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Don't reset temporal history on SceneTexturesExtent change. Sometimes SceneTexturesExtent can change due to inline view rendering (like water) which causes full history reset and results in visible noise on screen until things converge again.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Skip creating RGS when Lumen is disabled from the PPV volume.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Materials and Shaders",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an asset registry tag to find material instances causing shader permutations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled Virtual Texture sampling on Volume material domains.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the interpretation of the PreSkinned Local Bounds material node when used on Instanced Static Mesh. Previously it was the bounds for the entire component. Now it is the bounds for the mesh instance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added platform cached ini value to determine whether to compile 128 bit base pass pixel shader variations on platforms which require them. These are infrequently needed and turning them off can save 50k shaders / 15 MiB at runtime r.128BitBPPSCompilation.Allow (default is true, for backwards compatibility).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved error messages reported by shader conductor to properly identify where individual error messages begin and end (and so ensure each compile error is reported on its own).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled the ZoomToFocus behavior when creating a usage node from the declaration - No longer zooms the focus of the editor since this was visually jarring for the user.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized material instance post-load in Editor builds by directly hashing the portions of shadermap ID used to construct the unique asset name, rather than constructing the full string representation then hashing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Base field to Material Parameter Collections, which can be used to derive one collection from another, with the derived collection inheriting the base's properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for overriding a material's parameter collections with derived collections in material instances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Material scalar parameters can now optionally select an enumeration object to use for selecting scalar values by name in the material UI.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added default initialization of fields of FMaterialEnumerationEntry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added function APIs to MaterialEditingLibrary to manipulate the new Enumeration material parameter.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reworked ShaderDebugData output to unify the \"worker input\" and \"direct compile\" debug mechanisms:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed r.ShaderCompiler.DebugDumpWorkerInputs cvar; always dump a valid worker input file for all jobs whenever debug info is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved writing of this file into job completion callbacks alongside the other debug artifacts, so will be written out for cache hits if r.ShaderCompiler.DumpDebugInfoForCacheHits is true.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified these files to not include a copy of the compressed source, instead using the .usf artifacts.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed \"direct compile\" mode to \"debug compile\" and made it use this file instead of needing to serialize extra data into the debug .usf file.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed the r.DumpShaderDebugWorkerCommandLine cvar; all jobs will export a DebugCompileArgs.txt file containing the commandline that can be used to run SCW in debug compile mode by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified shader pipeline compile jobs to export a single worker input file (in the first stage's debug folder).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Each stage of a pipeline will export their own DebugCompileArgs.txt (for convenience, so if only a single stage fails you can still navigate to that stage's debug folder and run the job from there).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "The debug compile for any pipeline stage will run the full pipeline job (so compilation always matches what happens in the normal context) with paths modified to be relative to that specific debug folder for convenience (so when downloading debug output from another machine, only one path in the commandline needs to be fixed up to run)",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using the Material Editing Library of functions, now always refreshes the material instance editor when changing material instance parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a bug where you would set a MI parameter via a python script and the MI Editor wouldn't update the properties panel to show the newly updated value.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Automatically call UMaterialEditingLibrary::UpdateMaterialInstance() whenever a parameter on a instance is set via the library.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "UMaterialEditingLibrary::UpdateMaterialInstance should try to find any open material instance editors and tell them that the material instance has changed.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
