            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed validation accidentally changing usage with flags on materials.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CheckMaterialUsage will both check and set which can result in a race with shader compilation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use the component transform for local space vs the simulation one - When disabling requires current frame data (for performance) these could be out of sync, which mismatches other renderers on the RT (i.e. sprites & meshes)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed hash function in data channel to use full string data instead of just half of it.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "LWE: Set the sim target on the compiled data set to match the mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a mismatch that can cause attributes to not upload to the GPU when we are in CPU mode due to using the light / decal renderer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer call the OnSystemFinished delegate if we are constructing Blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The delegate might interfere with the actor / components and can cause crashes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Shader loading: Now prevent dereferencing potential nullptr when file is not found.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed emitter renderer tick ordering issue when combined with LWE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing postload calls for stateless emitters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Guarded against using EmitterData as it can be nullptr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed binding buffer changes causing dispatches to serialize on some RHIs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential OOB reads if a binding is invalid.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a lock to GPU Sort Manager AddTask to ensure no concurrent access.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a race between Niagara & Cascade adding tasks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now calculate spawn probability per particle for spawn rate, rather than per loop.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed user variables being removed and renderers not updating correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The variable was without namespace so failed to match.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a missing null check for the graph source that can happen during undo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed GetResourceSizeEx miscalculating for non-isotropic UTextureRenderTargetVolume.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Niagara component renderer: now only register one object replacement delegate with the CDO to prevent races during asset loading.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing CanBind to user parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed style of binding to be more consistent with other bindings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now sets the world time information in the baker.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes things like Engine.Time always being 0.0 and material based time effects not working as expected.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Used GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync with Radix Sort to fix issues on various GPUs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer load niagara system when getting asset registry tags, to prevent deadlocks during emitter merging.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled low latency when anything other than the lit view mode is active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Some of the view modes short circuit rendering so the data may not be ready in time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when copying script variable metadata.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Handled null data interface inside Niagara Variant.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It is unclear how the variant DI becomes nullptr at the moment, this will at least avoid crashing the editor, but more investigation is required to understand why.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed duplicating an emitter with RunUpdateScript set for interpolation mode changing post duplication to NoInterpolation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed single segment GPU ribbon UV calculations being incorrect.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential use-after-free on world tear down.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If the compute interface is marked pending kill we can ignore sending the command to remove from the computer interface as it will be killed before.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an asan issue using the component in the lambda.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Bring changes over for garbage references also.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect stride with FRibbonAccumulationValues when using different features.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed color curves not working inside NPCs when using GPU emitters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When modifying parameters in the detail panel, now use the editor setting GetResetSimulationOnParameterChange to see if we should reset the system or not.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Disabling reset can be useful to iterate on content live.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed editor undo crashing due to order being out of sync and the thumbnails.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed update context killing systems that are waiting for compilation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When switching preview modes the update context is called multiple times.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The first time it's considered active.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The next time it's no longer active but is waiting for compilation (compontent ticking) so is now removed from the reactivate list.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We now check if the component tick is enabled due to waiting for compilation results.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When setting up previous data use current if previous does not exist.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Current changing to a new position binding which does not have a previous value generated it would use the default position which is 0,0,0. Using the current value won't produce corrupt motion vectors, but will also not produce correct motion vectors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed default for LOD size Y to -1 to fix issue with meshes being culled incorrectly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "A value of -1 indicates that it will never be culled by screen size.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The previous value of 2 would be adjusted to 1.0 and fail the &gt;= screen size test if bounds were large enough.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now uses the aliased variable when finding the default mode",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes an issue if the first time a variable was encountered it was in StackContext as we would ignore the binding.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where min instead of max distance was used as LoD parameter.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a nullptr and weak ptr bug in error log format.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug when an error during script merge occurs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed memory leak in data channel object destructor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Path Tracer",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New</b><b>:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the adaptive sampling heuristic.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to hide the planet ground surface.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When using reference atmosphere mode, the path tracer no longer displays a large ground sphere to represent the planet for better parity with the deferred renderer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The old behavior of showing the planet ground can be accessed by the cvar r.PathTracing.EnableAtmosphereGround.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Post-process materials can now be specialized for the path tracer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This adds a permutation of the PostProcess Material that is used when the path tracer is enabled on the view.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can be used to account for differences in how the path tracer creates the image. Behavior can be customized with the PathTracingQualitySwitch node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved shadow artifacts in transparent shadows due to double-counting of transparent hits.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved startup time by moving rarely used permutations to experimental.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when enabling decal normal projection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Postprocessing",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the EOTF for UI composition in HDR from sRGB to BT.1886 for improved parity between SDR and HDR appearance. A new CVar r.HDR.UI.CompositeEOTF was added to provide control over this behavior.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "TSR:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an option to allow all shading models to use TSR thin geometry detection when r.TSR.ThinGeometryDetection.Coverage.ShadingRange=2.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added exposure offset (r.TSR.ShadingRejection.ExposureOffset) back so global darkening ghosting can be improved. The value behaves a little differently and is now used to adjust the exposure offset for the reject shading moire luma and guide history. Any legacy project before UE5.5 using the old CVar should consider adjusting the value.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated shader selection logic for CombineLUTs to force compute shader rather than pixel shader if graphics volume rendering is guaranteed, and reduced the size of the dispatch group from 512 threads to 64 threads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced usage of PF_R32G32B32F with PF_R32_FLOAT for the ACES gamut table texture to make the implementation compatible with more platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed alpha invert show flag on desktop if primary upscale was active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Bloom not working with TSR when motion blur is disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Forced the invalidation of the low-res scenecolor for translucency after motion blur pass if motion blur is not run.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "RHI",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "AddEnqueueCopyPass can now be used with texture arrays.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Metal:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Refactored bindless to support new FeatureLevel & Platforms and include a per-project experimental Mac option to enable SM5 Bindless.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Upgraded Metal Developer Tools from 4.4 to 5.3",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MetalCPP: Upgraded to metal-cpp_macOS15.2_iOS18.2",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug in the PS4 renderer submission queue that delayed signaling occlusion query events.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UpdateTexture2D() failure case where the source region has an offset and the texture is block compressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Substrate",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the rough diffuse shading model to minimize energy loss and improve the shaping at high roughness.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved legacy conversion of cloth materials.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The roughness range of cloth has been adjusted for better parity with the legacy cloth BRDF.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The specular amount is now automatically adjusted to account for the Fuzz layer being added on top of specular in Substrate whereas it was linearly blended in the legacy model.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed r.SubstrateBackCompatibility as we now rely on the Substrate Rough Diffuse option to drive that instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Set Blendable GBuffer format as default for new projects. Some archvis and automotive project templates are set to Adaptive GBuffer format by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed most material properties not being added to FMaterialData::PropertySizes when baking Substrate materials on the Actor Merge -&gt; Simplify path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "akON",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2537,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2068,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Simulation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Chaos Visual Debugger",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved batching of TEDS operations performed when new physics body data is loaded in the scene. This change, combined with some other improvements made in TEDS itself, resulted in ~75% reduction in the processing time when the first frame of a large CVD recording (+90.000 objects) is loaded. The stall in this particular case went down from ~12 seconds to ~3 seconds.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support to enable CVD recordings in Shipping configurations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new pop up notification to provide a cleared indication of when CVD is still processing trace data for a loaded file.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a non-blocking loading bar. This bar will appear in the status bar to indicate the loading process of very large CVD files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added initial experimental support for tracing smaller sections of a map instead of the entire map.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can be configured from code with the CVD_SET_RELEVANCY_VOLUME macro or via Blueprint with the CVD Set Trace Relevancy Volume node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note: If a recorded body moves to outside the recorded volume, CVD will show that body frozen in time. This will be addressed in the next release.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented the new view port toolbar the rest of the editor uses.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Extension System:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for attaching custom data to the CVD Recording instance.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for implementing 2D visualizations via CVD's component visualizer API",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved tracing performance by removing the need for locks (and reduced the contention of ones we could not remove) in some heavily multi threaded paths. Mostly in collision geometry and physics body metadata serialization paths.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed connection details from the Recording status message, and moved it to its own message which is sent when needed. This reduces the message bus bandwidth usage when a CVD recording is active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing serialization for FChaosVDParticleDynamicMisc::MLinearEtherDrag.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing serialization for FChaosVDParticleDynamicMisc::MSleepThresholdMultiplier",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing serialization for FChaosVDParticleDynamicMisc::MCollisionConstraintFlag.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where attempting to trace multiple processes at the same time could fail to playback, even if the recording was successfully started.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a race condition when a CVD recording is started at the same time or right before PIE is started, resulting in a crash.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where CVD's sessions manager broadcasts a session discovery ping every second, even if CVD is not open in the editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect visualization of per particle position/velocity/projection iteration counts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved iteration counts to FChaosVDParticleDynamicsMisc and added serialization version guards accordingly.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where trying to load the same CVD recording twice caused an ensure, and failed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the first frame of a recording was not automatically loaded in some scenarios, resulting in an empty scene until you scrubbed to a new frame or started playback.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an edge case where the recording controls UI could get soft locked, blocking you from stopping a recording that was just started.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where QueryData was used instead of SimData, in the details customization used for Collision Geometry details panels.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an error where the Network Tick sync mode was not clamping the track tick offsets to the supported limits in some scenarios.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where recorded destroyed particles were not being properly removed from the scene.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash that could happen if you play a CVD recording while it is still loading.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Cloth",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a ReferenceSpace local damping option to Chaos Cloth. This enables local damping about the reference space bone instead of the existing center of mass option.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated ChaosClothAsset and ChaosOutFitAsset to use SoftObjectPaths internally to better handle renamed dependent assets such as the Physics Asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Chaos Cloth to internally use FNames instead of FStrings for properties. This fixes a long-standing performance regression when setting simulation properties at runtime via the cloth blueprint interactor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the ability to specify the ReferenceBone for a cloth asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added additional accessory meshes for chaos cloth.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated the backstop constraint to be able to use this accessory mesh.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This feature is considered experimental.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cloth Remesh Node: Can now transfer vertex weight layers to output cloth render mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Chaos Cloth and Skeletal Mesh-based cloth to better handle non-simulating LODs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug where chaos cloth could stop simulating if there was a non-simulating LOD sandwiched between two simulating LODs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated Skeletal Mesh-based cloth to no longer tick cloth for non-simulating LODs when cloth is present on other LODs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Chaos cloth debug draw improvements: Added wind velocity and updated gravity display.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an editor crash which could occur when remeshing a chaos cloth asset with Long Range Constraints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issues with Kinematic Collider and Skinned Triangle Mesh, these were regressions from implementing Skinned Triangle Meshes in Chaos Cloth in the last release.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Kinematic Collider was using previous frame's positions for its constraint Apply causing it to lag behind and not fully resolve collisions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Kinematic Collider debug draw was broken due to an indexing bug.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added ClothCollisionThickness parameter on the SimulationCollisionConfigNode was not setting the correct string, so it wasn't being used.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fix for this will not affect existing assets (ClothCollisionThickness will be set back to 0 to retain existing behavior).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cloth Render Node: Now populate all UV Channels for output.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed CorrespondClothAssetIndex never set in BindToSkeletalMesh, since checks are stripped out in Shipping.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cloth Remesh Node: use the DynamicMesh UV layers to determine how many UV channels should be on each render vertex in the output ClothCollection (so that we don't accidentally add 4 channels when the input only has 1, for example).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Core Physics",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Partial Island Sleep:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a console command to enable partial island waking when the user explicitly manipulates the transform of a rigid body (\"p.Chaos.Solver.Sleep.PartialIslandSleep.PartialWakePreIntegration\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a console command to enable rigid body waking based on the velocity change introduced by the velocity collision solver (\"p.Chaos.Solver.Sleep.PartialIslandSleep.PostStepWakeThreshold\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a console command to restrict partial island sleep to collision constraints only, i.e. rigid bodies connected by other constraint types will have to be both awake or asleep (\"p.Chaos.Solver.Sleep.PartialIslandSleep.CollisionConstraintsOnly\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added console command to enable the propagation of impact momentum though the physics constraints to determine with the purpose of waking rigid bodies in partially sleeping islands (\"p.Chaos.Solver.Sleep.PartialIslandSleep.MomentumPropagation\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Introduced a Blueprint event to enable or disable partial island sleep for the entire island a rigid body is in (\"Set Allow Partial Island Sleep\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved performance by limiting partial island waking to scenarios with any sleeping rigid bodies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a console command to only enable partial island sleep if the decimal percentage of motionless rigid bodies is above a user-defined threshold (\"p.Chaos.Solver.Sleep.PartialIslandSleep.MinimumMotionlessRatio\").",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added generic AddElem function for AggGeom and helpers to access the correct containers based on input element type.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added SetUseMinTimestep function in Immediate Physics API.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This makes it possible to avoid switching to a fixed timestep when the delta time is small, bypassing the cvar p.Chaos.ImmPhys.MinStepTime",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new p.Chaos.MinParallelTaskSize cvar and CVarMinParallelTaskSize function to set a threshold of tasks to run in parallel, which can improve performance on low-core platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled some p.Chaos cvars (like p.Chaos.MaxNumWorkers) in Shipping so they can be used to tweak game-specific performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enable some physics cvars (like p.Chaos.MaxNumWorkers) in Shipping so they can be used to tweak game-specific performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for setting CollisionEnabled per ISM body.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed functions for calculating covariance matrix of a set of points and retrieving the dominant eigenvector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a per poly collision setter function to SkeletalMeshComponent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved several shapes from Chaos to ChaosCore.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to treat default as simulated for RBAN.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enforced drive linear force limits when non-linear joint solve is enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed SphereTraceComponent not returning the hit FaceIndex when tracing against complex shapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where AddForce related methods did not generate wake events in some scenarios.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now detect and remove null constraints from CCD swept constraints prior to application.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed collision behavior when converting from probe to nonprobe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized allocation in cable mesh building",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Chaos: Fixed wrong rotation axis when using simd for linear joint solver.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an occasional crash when unwelding rigid bodies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a physics bug where unwelding via socket name failed to unweld. This could lead to a crash when the parent body was destroyed and a query was performed against the child.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FKShapeElem copy constructor accidentally changing the CollisionEnabled flag instead of copying it.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dataflow",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Double clicking on a Dataflow variable now finds the related nodes in the Dataflow graph and sub-graphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow construction views are now generally more performant for large meshes and allow render data caching.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added transform support to dataflow rendering geometry groups.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added capsule rendering support to the rendering facade.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the weight map tool in dataflow to more closely match the UI of existing painting tools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dynamic mesh processor blueprint can now optionally specify that it is ok to run async.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "It is now possible to edit some of the bool / int / float non-connected input parameters inline on Dataflow nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'Cut Planes' array input to the PlaneCutter dataflow node, to support directly specifying the cutting plane(s).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Geometry Script based Dataflow node now exposes the Geometry script parameters out to the Dataflow node as connectable inputs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added general array Dataflow nodes for getting an element or reading the size of an array.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow can now automatically add a node to auto convert from an output type to an input type.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option for dataflow FilterPointsWithMesh node to filter by mesh min/max distances in addition to inside/outside winding number test.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a general dataflow selection -&gt; index array conversion node (so that e.g. one can iterate the selected indices).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for root proxies for Dataflow based Geometry Collection asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled construction view rendering for most of the geometry collection Dataflow nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a generic version of the math Clamp dataflow node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow variable nodes can now be used directly in Subgraphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the possibility to promote a dataflow input to a variable ( right click menu ).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry Script based dataflow nodes will now open the Geometry Script blueprint when double clicked on.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow now show an array pin icon for array types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Dataflow node to set a string transform attribute and to select from a string pattern.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added dataflow nodes for conversion from an index or index array to a dataflow selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Support \"Only Same Parent\" option for TinyGeo \"Merge Geometry\" mode (and corresponding dataflow node).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Dataflow nodes for getting bounds from static mesh and dynamic meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for setting up root proxies in Dataflow.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Dataflow node to set the dynamic state of geometry collection bones.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the Dataflow Editor to better handle Save As by reconnecting the newly created derived assets (e.g., Dataflow Asset) to the main asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added display of performance data for Dataflow subgraphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized the Dataflow collection spreadsheet ( up to 25x for large collections ).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Box, Capsule and Convex simple builders as geometry generators for dataflow physics assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for manipulating bones from the Dataflow Edit Skin Weight tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Fov and planes options to the view menu in both Dataflow simulation and construction views.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crashes due to incorrect selection init for some dataflow fracture nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Expanded out fracture brick pattern bounds by a half-brick, to fix bricks not quite covering the intended bounds in many cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the collection-&gt;mesh dataflow node take an optional selection and perform the conversion more consistently with the collection selection-&gt;meshes dataflow node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the dataflow 'show/hide inputs' menu to use the localized display names instead of the internal source code names.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add correct struct handling to dataflow context cache to support nested UObject references.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made blueprint dataflow nodes default to evaluate on the game thread, for safety.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added guards against selecting invalid indices. Now returns false instead of crashing on attempting to set an invalid selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Dataflow graph not re-evaluating when switching from manual to automatic evaluation mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure Dataflow nodes performance data is recorded per node even when the data is not shown on screen.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the Dataflow Selection by Level Node to make sure the level attribute exists in the collection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed \"append collections\" dataflow node not updating transform indices correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed array support for Dataflow subgraph inputs and outputs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Fluids / Smoke",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added default drag for accurate integration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for landscape proxies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Drag model updated buoyancy tests make sure physics assets for rafts computes mass with the correct material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added water, spray, foam shading improvements, translucent spray particles",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored capture modules in sw emitters to handle overhangs in terrain with better controls rework summary views.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed spike artifacts by only advecting to wet cells. This can avoid issues where we advect into steep areas that we shouldn't be.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "General Physics",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to reset the state of a geometry collection (from Blueprint or live from the editor with a button in the component details).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the ability to incrementally create new cache collection assets each time a Chaos cache records.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed Chaos cache observed component functions to Blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry collections can now be converted to Skeletal meshes (right click on the asset or in Dataflow).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to start and stop a Chaos Cache from Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added API for generic sweep traces (Sphere, Boxt, Capsule and Raycast) on the physics thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "It is now possible to query a geometry collection leaf bone using a line trace from Blueprints (FindLeafTransformByLineTrace).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
