            "content": "When recording multiple clients in Take Recorder, we recommend that you disable remote sequencer open. An error is now displayed to enforce this condition.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Remote Control Interception on function calls with constant reference parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Take Recorder:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed not applying time dilation when Sequencer was closed.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now transacts when removing a source from the subsystem, fixing MultiUser usage.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed OnStopped event not firing in subsystem.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed recording over an existing level sequence crashing when using the Take Recorder subsystem.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "ActorRecordingSettings no longer creates settings objects in the constructor, improving struct validation times.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Take Recorder Subsystem IsReviewing() returning true for a frame when stopping a recording.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed GetLastRecordedLevelSequence not returning the last level sequence while reviewing a recording.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when creating a level snapshot in a multi-user session.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash that occurred when a Cine Assembly Schema was created with a name whose length exceeded path limits.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Naming Tokens:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Evaluation data no longer initializes datetime in the constructor, fixing an issue with CDO stability.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now provides world context by default.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Motion Design:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Text3D:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed missing glyph geometry when using some fonts like Antonio, Teko... caused by the code checking if a contour is contained within another only testing a segment instead of the entire polygon or bounding box.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed UnrealServer compilation warnings caused by FreeType and HarfBuzz macro redefinition.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed dynamic mesh renderer crash when text gets regenerated due to update flags not triggering a complete refresh of the render proxy.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added game ready player collisions for static and dynamic mesh",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed layout extension to handle RTL text.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Adjusted wrapping code for RTL text.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed Text3D can be used in packaged builds.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Switchboard:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Included rsync daemon in the job object to ensure it doesn't outlive the Switchboard process.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer discard keystrokes in the Add Device dialog that would otherwise cause the device name to collide with an existing device.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SwitchboardListener:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Avoided leaking ETW trace sessions via PresentMon invocations in the event of unclean shutdown.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Prevented child processes from inheriting unintended handles. Unintentionally leaking various resources into child processes that outlive SBL is suspected to be involved in a multitude of intermittent issues, such as:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Inability to bind to the configured listening port when re-launching SBL.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "NVAPI initialization failures.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Network performance degradation and disconnects.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated OSCSwitchboard editor utility object to use new Take Recorder Subsystem events in addition to keeping the legacy TR BP delegate events.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mocap Record manager: Added missing calls to emit take and slate changes and to accept an externally called StartRecording event.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remote Control:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issues with deleting/renaming groups in the group context menu.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when playing a level in PIE with embedded Remote Control preset and opening another level while PIE is running.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where the Create Camera button would not show up for Cine Assemblies in the Sequencer editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a Web Remote Control building issue on Mac where the bin directory added to PATH in the Start script was not absolute causing the subsequent web app scripts to fail.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Protocol bindings now correctly mark the preset modified when changing the override mask.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue where the 'Add Actor Track' menu option would not show up for Cine Assembly assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Live Link Hub:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed play and reverse button tooltips not updating correctly while in playback.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a freeze when looping large recordings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a freeze if waiting for frames to buffer where the range required was spread across different tracks, but not within a single track.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a possible freeze when reversing or stopping a recording immediately after looping.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed the default selection end time possibly ending early. Recording length now goes by furthest track timestamp, not frame number.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a delay when scanning the asset registry after a directory change detection to help cases where the file system may still be locking the file after a manual move.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added a recording context option to rescan the recording list manually.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Prevent loading or creating a config if the playback session is active.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed recordings not always looping.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Improved frame time calculation and increased precision.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Buffer range reported should no longer report past max frames.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issues when jumping to a specific frame. Waiting for a frame to buffer will now properly validate the frame is ready across all tracks. Fixes several issues:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Previously buffered frames that were cached and pending removal would still be considered buffered even if they weren't ready, resulting in the wrong frame being displayed initially.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Jumping to a frame that was buffered and ready on one track, but not ready on another track that had inconsistent frames or a faster frame rate would not wait for this track's frame to be ready, displaying the wrong frame.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Reversing from the start to end frame, such as from a reverse play loop, would hit one or both of these issues and the animation would not always continue playing correctly.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UDP Messaging:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue when the loopback device was not added to the multicast group; so only the first editor instance launch would receive multicast packets. We now always join the group across all instances so other editor instances can be in the same multicast group.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made multiple reliability improvements to UDP Messaging.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Media Plate's Aspect Ratio and Mesh Mode transactions to fix Multi-User operations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "VR Editor: FVREditorModeManager now explicitly shuts down VR Editor in response to FEditorDelegates::OnEditorPreExit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the Render Grid crashing when passing in an empty string when setting Remote Control values",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where attaching an actor to the socket of a skinned mesh actor would not transact in Multi-User or reapply the attachment as part of an undo operation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Multiuser: Fixed a possible crash when stopping a take record or reverting take changes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Capture Manager: Fixed several crashes while aborting take upload.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lens Calibration no longer depends on (legacy) Composure, and all features that relied on it have been replicated using internal functionality. Opening lens file assets will no longer add a temporary Composure actor to the level.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Templates",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "VR Template:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The directional light is now configured to draw shadows on standalone XR platforms. Enabled Single Sample Shadow from Stationary Lights on BP_Pistol to reduce shadow cost (it's already enabled on all other dynamic actors in the scene).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented an example of how Passthrough can be toggled. The option can be found in the hand menu. Note that this native Passthrough solution is currently only available on Meta Quest as the OpenXR runtime must support XR_EXT_composition_layer_inverted_alpha.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "VR Template content has now been moved to be a shared template resource named XRFramework. This enables the VR template content to be used in multiple templates.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The mannequin hands are now a shared template resource. We can now use them in multiple XR templates.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renamed Blueprints to match the style guide of new templates",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added unique descriptions to all Input Actions and Input Mapping Contexts",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the Android Runtime category tag for immersive mode selection. See the OpenXR specifications appendix about the Android runtime category for more information.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "VR Template:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevent VR Spectator inputs if HMD is not enabled. This fixes an issue when trying to use a mouse and keyboard pawn in the VR Template for testing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Grab-logic now works even if MotionControllerSource is changed to non-default (such as Palm).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed hand models staying hidden if switching which hand the Pistol was being held with.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Rebuilt lighting to get rid of shadow artifacts from Point Lights.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Collaborative Viewer Template: Fixed default pawn not turning when moving mouse. The template used a Set Mouse Position-function hack which doesn't behave the same as it used to, and input logic had to be updated to not use that function in the same way.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "Jg41",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}

    Upgrade Notes

    {
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2538,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2069,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Animation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Control Rig",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Projects using Control Rig Physics, previously provided by the Physics Control plugin, will now need to enable the Control Rig Physics plugin as well.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Runtime",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Since this code change causes some variables to become unused in a variant of UpdateHistory_TransformHistory, it is now marked as deprecated.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The signature of experimental function UpdateHistory_WorldSpace has been changed",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Editor",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Framework",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Previously, the UEdGraphSchema performed asset reference filtering when dropping assets on graphs (but not nodes or pins). This high level assumption doesn't hold up for all types of graphs, for example, some graphs open the asset dropped on them for edit. Since the UEdGraphSchema doesn't have knowledge of what the graph represents, asset reference filtering has moved to the implementation details of the various graphs that support it.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Any classes that derive from UEdGraphSchema and implement DroppedAssetsOnNode should perform their own asset reference filtering if dropping an asset on the graph creates a reference from the graph asset to the dropped asset.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "UI",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Public access to UFont::CompositeFont is now deprecated.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use UFont::GetCompositeFont() if you want to resolve the FCompositeFont to use at runtime (if any).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use UFont::GetInternalCompositeFont() or UFont::GetMutableInternalCompositeFont() if you need to specifically access/modify UFont::CompositeFont.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Developers should carefully review their use of GetCachedWidget. If a system depends on the outer wrapped widget being returned, use GetWrappedWidget instead. GetCachedWidget may not always return the wrapped widget as expected.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "UX",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The depth bar supports displaying custom widgets that are automatically arranged by depth. This is used in the Level Viewport Client to display selected objects along the depth bar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "These features can be disabled with the \"r.Editor.ManualOrthoDepth 0\" CVar.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Foundation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Build",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "For projects overriding UAssetManager's functions GetPackageManagers, ModifyCook, GetPackageCookRule, GetPackageChunkIds, or UpdateManagementDatabase, there is now an additional EDependencyProperty::CookRule on EDependencyCategory::Manage properties, and there are two types of PackageManagers reported by the UAssetManager:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetPackageManagers for managers that control only chunk assignment (which pakfile/iostore container an Asset is placed into).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetPackageCookRuleManagers for managers that affect both cookrule (whether an Asset gets cooked), and chunk assignment.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Assets that declare usedingame dependencies affect both categories of their dependencies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Assets that declare editoronly, non-build dependencies affect neither.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Assets that declare editoronly, build dependencies affect chunk assignment but not the cookrule. This new property was added to support correct chunk assignment for platform-specific dependencies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Core",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MSVC v14.50 compiler bundled with Visual Studio 2026 is not currently supported.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Developers can change the default behavior of TArray&lt;&gt; and related containers to behave more like traditional C++ containers, so that they will only compact when Shrink() is explicitly called. Use the `FNonshrinkingAllocator` as your array allocator to request this behavior. This can also be passed as the secondary allocator for TInlineAllocator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nuget packages will continue to be audited for other configurations as these are urgent issues to address, but this will prevent blocking errors for licensees and CI while they are addressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dev Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updating Project Build Settings:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If your project is a code project, the following applies. This does not apply to content-only projects, as they do not contain *Target.cs files.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Launcher & Installed Engine Builds:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "For each *Target.cs file in your project, update the build settings to V6:DefaultBuildSettings = BuildSettingsVersion.V6",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Note: If the project is opened from the Epic Games Launcher, you’ll see a prompt identifying which *Target.cs file must be updated. After making this change, reopen the project.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For Source Engine Builds (not an installed version):",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "For each *Target.cs file in your project, you have two options:",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "enhanced_list",
                        "style": "ordered",
                        "items": [
                          [
                            {
                              "type": "paragraph",
                              "content": "Recommended (Upgrade): Follow the same steps as for Launcher & Installed builds and set the DefaultBuildSettings:DefaultBuildSettings = BuildSettingsVersion.V6.",
                              "settings": {
                                "is_hidden": false
                              }
                            }
                          ],
                          [
                            {
                              "type": "paragraph",
                              "content": "Stay on Current Build Settings: If you wish to remain on your existing DefaultBuildSettings, you must declare a unique build environment:BuildEnvironment = TargetBuildEnvironment.Unique.",
                              "settings": {
                                "is_hidden": false
                              }
                            }
                          ]
                        ],
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Framework",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Audio",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Existing subtitles inside Asset UserData will need to be remade.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Any classes inheriting from USubtitleTextBlock need to instead inherit from USubtitleWidget.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Gameplay",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "You can suppress the deprecation warnings with the bEnabledLegacyMappingDeprecationWarnings option in the project's input settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The CVar AbilitySystem.WarnCooldownEffectWithoutTags can be used to opt-out of this, for example if your GameplayAbility subclass implements a different way of checking cooldowns.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Trying to create a FTickableGameObject with default options from a worker thread (such as during async loading) will now ensure as this is a race condition that could crash. To fix this, use the new FTickableGameObject(ETickableTickType::Never) constructor and then call SetTickableTickType after initialization is complete.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "If you make a custom camera node evaluator, you can now opt-out of features you don't need, but you get them all by default. It avoids the situation where making a new node results on stuff not working because you didn't add the correct flag.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "This behavior is enabled by default, but you can go back to processing only on the main game thread with this console variable: [ConsoleVariables] WindowsApplication.UseWorkerThreadForRawInput=false",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Authors of custom movement modes in Mover 2.0 will need to update their code:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Callers must now provide an angular velocity to FMoverDefaultSyncState::SetTransforms_WorldSpace in order to ensure that angular velocity can persist when changing mode",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FRotator FProposedMove::AngularVelocity is now replaced by FVector FProposedMove::AngularVelocityDegrees.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "UMovementUtils::ComputeAngularVelocity is now deprecated, callers should use ComputeAngularVelocityDegrees",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add a way to deprecate specific \"legacy\" axis and action mapping names. If this flag is set to true on the project settings, then any BP references to it will have a deprecation warning. Any C++ Bind calls using these names will also emit a warning.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Some of your camera rigs may need some parameters to be pre-blended. Backwards compatibility was not kept for this change (it was too costly and unnecessary given GameplayCameras' \"Experimental\" status) so you'll have to re-enable the option for these parameters.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a \"IsVirtual\" flag to FKeys so that you check at runtime if the key is virtual.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added two new virtual keys for accept and back, which are bindable and useable in Enhanced Input.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We need to make new keys here because FKeys are serialized via their FName, so in order to make sure that it properly serializes per-platform we need to save out the keys with unique names and then populate the key details with the \"real\" value at runtime.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Check for the instigating controller on an actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For actor components, get the owning actor and check that instigating controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "If you are dealing with the map-placed actor duplicating bindings bug in UE 5.5 and 5.6, see the <a href=\"https://issues.unrealengine.com/issue/UE-273286\">resolution notes here</a>.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mass",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Renamed all `FMassBatchedCommand::Execute` overrides to `Run` and made it non-constant.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Level Design and Art Tools",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Landscape",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Example Command Line: ProjectName MapName -run=WorldPartitionBuilderCommandlet -SCCProvider=Perforce -Builder=WorldPartitionLandscapeBuilder -AllowCommandletRendering ( -IterativeCellSize=Value)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated ULandscapeEditLayerBase::GetActions and FEditLayerAction to remove custom actions from runtime logic. Edit Layer customization classes can implement IEditLayerCustomization and register to the Landscape Editor module.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Online",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Crash Reporter",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Previously, the format was protobuf and needed to be converted using plcrashutil, but now the format is crashlog.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Platform",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mac",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "If HairStrands rendering is needed on Mac SM5, the feature can be enabled in addition to using the experimental feature bindless SM5 in project settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "XR",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "If your project has an xr.MobileLDRDynamicResolution setting, you should replace it with an xr.MobilePrimaryScalingMode setting:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "xr.MobileLDRDynamicResolution=0 -&gt; xr.MobilePrimaryScalingMode=0",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "xr.MobileLDRDynamicResolution=1 -&gt; xr.MobilePrimaryScalingMode=1",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FOpenXRRenderBridge::RunOnRHISubmissionThread, which should be used to wrap all OpenXR calls that can submit directly to the graphics queue (xrBeginFrame, xrEndFrame, xrAcquireSwapchainImage, xrReleaseSwapchainImage).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "xrEndFrame in FOpenXRHMD is currently exempted because the submission thread is flushed before we present.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Rendering",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Lighting",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Upgrade Notes:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added immediately deprecated r.LightMaxDrawDistanceScale.UseLegacyFadeBehavior_WillBeRemoved to temporarily restore previous behavior.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Materials and Shaders",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cached the ShaderPlatform inside MaterialResource, derive the FeatureLevel from that ShaderPlatform.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cache/Find MaterialResource by QualityLevel/ShaderPlatform instead of QualityLevel/FeatureLevel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated all the Setter/Getter functions for MaterialResource, MaterialRelevance that take FeatureLevel and replace them with ShaderPlatform.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated all FMaterialResource/FMaterial/UMaterial/UMaterialInstance functions that take ShaderPlatform as argument, since the ShaderPlatform should already be cached inside the MaterialResource when it was added.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated BuildFeatureLevelWidget, LoadEditorFeatureLevel, SaveEditorFeatureLevel for BuildShaderPlatformWidget, LoadEditorShaderPlatformPreview, SaveEditorShaderPlatformPreview.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated GetCurrentFeatureLevelPreviewText, GetCurrentFeatureLevelPreviewTextVisibility, BuildFeatureLevelWidget for GetCurrentShaderPlatformPreviewText, GetCurrentShaderPlatformPreviewTextVisibility, BuildShaderPlatformWidgetMark.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated virtual functions from MaterialInterface and FMaterial as final to avoid silent errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "MegaLights",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marking for HairStrands data is not yet implemented; it will produce a warning. \"Reference mode\" works the same with raytracing and will often tend to work with VSM, but could in theory miss marking some pages, so also produces a warning. This is not expected to be a useful mode though as reference mode should generally use raytracing (and perhaps should force it for all lights).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Simulation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Core Physics",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a dependency to the ChaosCore module.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Modular Vehicles",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an additional input quantization mechanism.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Virtual Production",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>API Change:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GetValue and GetValueInArray of the IRemoteControlPropertyHandle now correctly take UObject* references.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remove ProvidedNamespace as it was not in use anywhere. No deprecation as this is an experimental plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "6kQb",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}
    Made with Material for MkDocs
